note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.48；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=195-195；zh_pdf_pages=481-482；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床常见痉厥、抽搐。目睛上吊等，并伴有高热、神昏、谵语等症。多见于热性病的极期。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: convulsion, hyperphoria, accompanied by high fever, coma, delirium, etc., often seen in the climax of a febrile disease,
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.50；zh_sentence_span=2-3；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=196-196；zh_pdf_pages=482-482；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多由于生血不足或失血过多，或久病耗伤营血，以致肝血不足，筋脉失养，或血亏不荣络，引起虚风内动。
en: It indicates endopathic wind of deficiency type stirring up inside, brought about by failure of insufficient liver blood to nourish tendons and vessels, or failure of blood to nourish collaterals, resulting from decreased production of blood, or massive loss of blood, or protracted illness which impairs blood.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.52；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=197-197；zh_pdf_pages=482-482；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床可见皮肤干燥或肌肤甲错，并有皮肤瘙痒或落屑等。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: dryness of the skin or dry and squamous skin, accompanied by itching or desquamation of skin, etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.53；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=197-197；zh_pdf_pages=482-483；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 即湿浊内生，是指由脾的运化功能和输布津液的功能障碍，引起水湿痰浊蓄积停滞的病理状态。
en: It indicates the morbid condlition of retention of water and phlegm within the body, caused by disturbance of the spleen's transporting and distributing function.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.55；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=198-198；zh_pdf_pages=483-483；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 湿阻中焦，可见脘腹胀满、食欲不振、口腻或口甜、舌苔厚腻等脾虚湿困之症。
en: In addition, Blockage of the middle-Jiao by dampness is marked by abdominal distention, poor appetite, greasy taste or sweat taste in the mouth, thick greasy fur of the tongue, etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.55；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=5；en_pdf_pages=198-198；zh_pdf_pages=483-483；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 内燥多见于肺、胃、大肠等脏腑、其中以肺燥为主者，在上述内燥病变的基础上，还兼见干咳无痰，甚则咯血；以胃燥为主者，可伴见舌光红无苔：若系肠燥。则常见便秘等症。
en: Endogenous dryness is commonly seen in the lungs, stomach and large intestine. In addition to the symptoms mentioned above, lung-dryness as the main symptom is also accompanied by dry cough without sputum, or even hemoptysis, while stomach-dryness as the main symptom is followed by reddened tongue without fur. Lastly, in case of intestine-dryness there will be constipation.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.56；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=3-5；en_pdf_pages=198-199；zh_pdf_pages=483-484；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 是体内病理产物如痰浊、瘀血，以及虫积、食积等、均能郁而化火。
en: Secondly, pathologic products of the body, such as phlegm, stagnated blood, malnutrition due to parasitic infestation, food retention, all can accumulate to be trasformed into fire.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.57；zh_sentence_span=7；en_sentence_span=8；en_pdf_pages=199-200；zh_pdf_pages=484-484；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 其对心脏生理功能的影响，主要有以下几个方面：(1)躁扰心神。
en: The main influence it has on the physiologic functions of the heart may be summarized as follows:(1) It disturbs the mind.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.59；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=201-202；zh_pdf_pages=485-485；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: (2)血热而脉流薄疾。
en: (2) It causes biood-heat and swift blood flow.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.59；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=201-202；zh_pdf_pages=485-485；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: (3)心火上炎与下移。
en: (3) It gives rise to flaring-up or moving-down of the heart-fire.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.59；zh_sentence_span=6；en_sentence_span=6；en_pdf_pages=201-202；zh_pdf_pages=485-485；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 心开窍干舌，心火循心之别络上炎，可见口舌糜烂，舌尖灼痛、口鼻干燥等症；心与小肠相表里，心火循经下移小肠，可见小便黄赤、灼热疼痛等症。
en: As the tongue is the orifice of the heart, it can reflect the physiological and pathological states of the latter. If the heart-fire flames upward along the large collaterals. there will be such symptoms as ulceration of the mouth and tongue, burning pain at the tip of the tongue, dry mouth and nose, etc. On the other hand the heart is interior-exteriorly related to the small intestine.

entities.en: interior-exterior relationship between the heart and the small intestine

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.59；zh_sentence_span=7；en_sentence_span=7-9；en_pdf_pages=201-202；zh_pdf_pages=485-485；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 神思衰弱，反应迟钝、迷蒙多睡，赖言声低等病理表现。
en: Clinically, there appears to be listlessness, weakened mental state, slow response, drowsiness, disinclination to talk, low voice, etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.60；zh_sentence_span=6；en_sentence_span=5；en_pdf_pages=202-203；zh_pdf_pages=485-486；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: (2)血脉寒滞。
en: (2) Blood stagnation due to cold.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.60；zh_sentence_span=7；en_sentence_span=6；en_pdf_pages=202-203；zh_pdf_pages=485-486；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 虚火内扰心神，可见神志不宁，或虚烦不得眠。
en: When fire of deficiency type disturbs the mind, there may appear such manifestations as irritability and insomnia.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.61；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=203-203；zh_pdf_pages=486-486；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 心血不足，则血脉空虚而心无所主，可见脉细无力。血虚不能养神，则神识衰弱，可见神思难以集中专一，甚则神思恍惚。
en: Deficiency of the heartblood leads to reduced blood circulation marked by smail weak pulse, and to neurosis due to inability to nourish the mind, manifested as inability to concentrate attention, or even trance.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.62；zh_sentence_span=2-3；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=203-204；zh_pdf_pages=486-486；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 血虚不能上荣于面，可见面色无华，舌色不荣。
en: Poor supply of nutrition to the face due to blood deficiency is manifested by dim complexion and dryness of the tongue.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.62；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=5；en_pdf_pages=203-204；zh_pdf_pages=486-486；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 血虚不能养心，则见心悸不安，甚则惊恐等病理表现。
en: And as a result of failure of blood to noursh the heart, there may appear such symptoms as palpitation, or even panic.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.62；zh_sentence_span=6；en_sentence_span=6；en_pdf_pages=203-204；zh_pdf_pages=486-486；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 又称心脉痹阻，是指血液运行不利，痹阻心脉的病变。
en: Stagnation of the heart-blood, or blockage of the heart vessels, refers to the pathologic changes marked by stagnation of blood in the heart vessels due to impeded circulation of blood.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.63；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=204-204；zh_pdf_pages=486-486；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 心脉痹阻，血运不畅，故见心胸憋闷、疼痛等。
en: Due to obstruction of the heart vessels and impeded blood circulation, there may appear such symptoms as oppressed sensation and pain in the chest.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.63；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=204-204；zh_pdf_pages=486-486；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多因久病气虚，或劳伤过度，耗损肺气而致。
en: It usually results from consumption of the lung-Qi by protracted illness or overstrain, or from prolonged impairment of the lung's dispersing and descending function.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.64；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=204-205；zh_pdf_pages=486-487；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 一般地说，外感多影响肺的宣发功能、而致肺气不宜。内伤多影响肺的肃降功能，而致肺失肃降。
en: Generally speaking, exogenous pathogens often impair the lung's dispersing function, leading to obstruction of the lung-Qi, while internal injury affects the lung's purifying and descending function, leading to their dysfunction.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.65；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=205-206；zh_pdf_pages=487-487；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肺气失宣，明肺主呼吸的生理功能受影响，造成气机不利，呼吸不畅，而见鼻塞胸闷，亦可致卫气郁滞，腠理闭塞而无汗。
en: Obstruction of the lung-Qi results in dysfunction of the lung-Qi and impairment of the lung's respiratory function, marked by nasal obstruction, chest stuffiness, or anhidrosis due to stagnation of the defensive Qi and obstruction of superficies.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.65；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=205-206；zh_pdf_pages=487-487；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 若因肺气虚而宣发无力、则卫表不固而自汗。
en: If reduced dispersing function of the lung's results from deficiency of the lung-Qi, it is manifested by spontaneous perspiration due to lowered the body resistance.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.65；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=205-206；zh_pdf_pages=487-487；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 即脾气虚，又称中气不足。多饮食所伤，脾失健运，或禀赋素虚，或久病耗伤，或劳倦过度损伤所致。
en: Insufficiency of the spleen-Qi, also refered to as Qi-insufficiency of. the middle-Jiao, is mostly caused by dysfunction of the spleen due to improper diet, by congenital weak constitution, by consumption after prolonged illness, or by overstrain.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.67；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=206-207；zh_pdf_pages=487-488；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 脾气虚弱则运化无权，可见纳食不化，口淡无味。脾虚，升清作用减弱，影响及胃的降浊，而致清浊升降失司，则上可见头目眩晕，中可见脘腹胀闷，下可见便糖泄泻。
en: Deficiency of the spleen-Qi results in impaired transporting-transforming function of the spleen, manifested as indigestion and tastelessness in the mouth, while deficiency of the spleen proper also leads to impairment of its function in sending up essential substances, which, in turn, affects the function of the stomach to send digested food downward, manifested in the upper part of the body as dizziness, in the middle part as distension in epigastrium, and in the lower part as loose stool and diarrhea.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.67；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=206-207；zh_pdf_pages=487-488；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 脾失其健运，气血生化无源，可见全身性的气血不足。
en: Dysfunction of the spleen due to its deficiency deprives Qi and blood of their source, of growth and development, leading to systemic insussiciency of Qi and blood.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.67；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=206-207；zh_pdf_pages=487-488；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 脾虚统血无权，可见失血，如便血、崩漏等。
en: Moreover, deficiency of the spleen also impairs its function in governing blood, manifested by loss of blood, such as hemafecia, metrorrhagia, metrostaxis, etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.67；zh_sentence_span=6；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=206-207；zh_pdf_pages=487-488；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 脾气虚，升举无力，甚则下陷，可见久泄脱肛，内脏下垂等病理表现。
en: Finally, deficiency of the spleen-Qialso weakens its lifting function, or even causes its collapse, manifested by such pathological manifestations as prolapse of rectum due to lingering diarrhea, ptosis of internal organs, etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.67；zh_sentence_span=7；en_sentence_span=5；en_pdf_pages=206-207；zh_pdf_pages=487-488；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 脾气炝则运化失职，可见腹胀便塘，纳食不化等症，而津液不足，失其濡润，可见口舌干燥，舌红少苔等症。
en: As a result of impairment of the spleen's transporting and transforming function, there may appear such symptoms as abdominal distention, loose stool, indigestion, etc. As a result of insufficiency of body fluid, there may appear symptoms such as dry mouth and tongue, and reddish tongue with little fur.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.69；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2-3；en_pdf_pages=208-208；zh_pdf_pages=488-488；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多因精神刺激，情志抑郁不畅、肝失疏泄，导致气机郁滞在气机郁滞的部位，可出现胀满疼痛、如两胁胀满或右胁疼痛等。
en: It is caused by sluggish functional activities of the liver-Qi due to dysfunction of the liver resulting from emotional upset or depression. In the affected area there may appear distending pain, e. g., bilateral hypochondriac fullness, or pain in the right hypochondrium etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.70；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1-2；en_pdf_pages=208-208；zh_pdf_pages=488-488；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 若痰气或气血互结，在其结滞的局部可出现肿块；如主可发为瘿瘤、梅核气，中可发为两乳胀痛结块，下可发为少腹疼痛、睾丸坠胀等。
en: If stagnation of Qi combines with that of phlegm or blood, in the affected area there may appear lumps, manifested in the upper part as goiter and globus hystericus; in the middle part as lumps with distending pain in the breast, in the lower part as lower abdominal pain, bearing-down and distending pain in the testis, etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.70；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=208-208；zh_pdf_pages=488-488；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 另外，肝气郁结，横逆犯胃，则胃气上逆。可见嗳气吞酸，而横逆犯脾，则痛泻交作。
en: Moreover, stagnation of the liver-Qi and its transverse invasion of the stomach lead to adverse rising of the stomach-Qi, manifested as belching, and acid regurgitation. In case of transverse invasion of the spleen by the hyperactive liver-Qi diarrhea with pain occurs as a result.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.70；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=4-5；en_pdf_pages=208-208；zh_pdf_pages=488-488；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多因肝郁气滞，郁而化火，而致肝火上冲；或因暴怒伤「,肝气暴张，引发肝火上升；或因情志所伤，五志过极化火，心火亢盛，引动肝火所致。
en: It is brought about by upward movement of the liver-fire which is transformed from the depressed liver-Qi, by violent rage which impairs the liver, leading to the rise of the liver-fire; or by the movement of the liver-fire transformed from five emotions in excess.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.71；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=209-209；zh_pdf_pages=488-489；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 血虚又易化燥生风，而致虚风内动，则见皮失瘙痒、或筋挛肉润等病理表现。
en: Moreover, deficiency of blood may also give rise to dryness-transformation leading to stirring up of wind of deficiency type, manifested by such pathological manifestations as itch, clonic spasm of muscle due to trauma or cramp.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.72；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=209-210；zh_pdf_pages=489-489；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肾精不足，在婴儿时可影响生长发育。在青年时可影响天癸至，而阻碍性腺的发育成熟。
en: Insufficiency of the kidnely-essence may retard the growth and development of infants, or delay the be. ginning of menstrual function and impede the development and maturiity of sexual glands at puberty, or lead to senilism and hyposexuality among the middle-aged, marked by impotence and spermatorrhea.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.75；zh_sentence_span=2-3；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=211-211；zh_pdf_pages=489-490；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肾精不足而致髓海空虚时，可见智力减退，动作迟钝，两足痿弱等临床表现。
en: If insufficiency of the kidney-essence affects the sea of marrow (brain), there may appear such clinical manifestations as mental retardation, bradypragia, flaccidity of the legs, etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.75；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=211-211；zh_pdf_pages=489-490；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肾气不充，则失其封藏之职，对二便失于固摄。
en: As a result of dysfunction of the kidneys, unconsolidation of the kidney-Qi leads to inability to control defecation and urination, manifested as fecal and urinous incontinence and enuresis.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.76；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=211-211；zh_pdf_pages=490-490；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肾对二便失于固摄，可见大便滑脱、遗尿、或二便失禁。
en: This morbid state impairs the air-receiving function of the kidneys, and dyspnea occurs even on slight exertion.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.76；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=211-211；zh_pdf_pages=490-490；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 胃气虚弱，则受纳饮食物和腐熟水谷的功能减退，可出现胃纳不佳，饮食无味，甚则不思饮食等病理表现。
en: It leads to weakened function of the stomach in receiving and transforming food, thereby resulting in such pathological manifestations as poor appetite, tastelessness in the mouth, or even anorexia.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.79；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=213-213；zh_pdf_pages=490-491；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 胃虚而失和降，可出现脘腹胀满，甚至胃气上逆而出现嗳气、恶心、呕吐、呃逆等病理表现。
en: It also leads to dysfunction of the stomach in transporting food downward marked by fullness in epigastrium or even belching nausea, vomiting, and hiccup due to adverse rising of the stomach-Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.79；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=213-213；zh_pdf_pages=490-491；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 替寒则其腐熟水谷的功能可明显减退，又常见食入不化的病理表现。
en: It also leads obviously to dysfunction of the stomach in transforming food into chyme, marked by indigestion.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.81；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=213-214；zh_pdf_pages=491-491；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 胃火循经上炎，或为齿痛龈肿，或为齿衄。
en: When the fire flares up along the channels, it gives rise to gingivitis or gingival hemorrhage.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.82；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=5；en_pdf_pages=214-215；zh_pdf_pages=491-492；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 中医学认为，人体是一个有机的整体，各组成部分之间，在生理上是相互联系的，在病理上是相互影响的，局部的病变可以影响到全身，内脏的病变可以从五官、四肢等体表各个方面反映出来。
en: TCM holds that the human body is an organic whole whose component parts are physiologically interconnected and pathologically interacted and that the local lesions may affect the entire body and disorders of internal organs, in turn, may manifest themselves in various aspects of the body surface, such as the five sense organs, the extremities and so on.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.1；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=215-215；zh_pdf_pages=492-492；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 面部和舌与五腔六腑的关系密切、脏腑气血的盛衰变化最容易通过这些部位形、色的改变表现出来，所以面部和舌是望诊最常用和最主要的部位。
en: Since the face and the tongue have close relation to the five Zang-organs and the six Fu-organs, and the vicissitudes of the Zang-Fu-organs can be most easily reflected by the appearance and colour of these location, they are the commonest and the most principal places for observation.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.2；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=215-216；zh_pdf_pages=492-492；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 望小儿指纹是儿科特有的诊断方法，在小儿疾病的诊断中有重要意义。
en: Inspection of the superficial venules of the infant's index finger, as a special diagnostic method in peadiatrics, is of great significance in the diagnosis of childhood diseases.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.2；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=215-216；zh_pdf_pages=492-492；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 指观察患者神气的盛衰变化。人体生命活动的总称叫做神，它包括整个生命活动的外在表现和思维意识两个方面。
en: This refers to inspection of patient's vicissitudes of vitality, vitality, a general term for life processes of the human body, involves two aspects:(1) the outward manifestations of all life activities, and (2) thought and consciousness, vitality exists in the physique without which there will be no vitality.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.3；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=216-216；zh_pdf_pages=492-492；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 神存在于形体之中，有形才有神，形体健康，神才能正常，若形体发生病变也必然反映为神的异常上，神的盛衰是形体健康与否的重要标志。
en: Hence, sound vitality dwells in healthy physique, and, conversely, diseased physique can certainly lead to abnormal vitality. As a result, the vicissitudes of vitality are an important mark of whether or not the physique is healthy.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.3；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=2-3；en_pdf_pages=216-216；zh_pdf_pages=492-492；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 神的表现是多方面的、但突出地表现在目光上，所以望神的重点在于望目光、表情和形体动态。
en: Vitalty may be manifested in manifold aspects, especially in the eyes. Therefore, observation of vitality is focused on the patient's eyes, facial expression and behavior.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.3；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=4-5；en_pdf_pages=216-216；zh_pdf_pages=492-492；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 得神即有神，是脏腑气血允足的表现，一一般见于正常人，若见于病人、则表示病情轻浅，正气未伤、预后良好。
en: Possession of vitality or vigour, is a manifestation of abundant Qi-blood of the Zang-Fu-orangs, commonly seen in a healthy person.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.4；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=216-217；zh_pdf_pages=493-493；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 其表现是：意识清楚，语言清晰，瞳神明亮，而色涧泽，反应灵敏，体态自如，气息平顺，肌肉不削，二便正常、心的精气充足，则意识清楚、语言清晰。
en: When seen in a patient, it implies a mild illness without serious damage of the vital Qi, often accompanied by a favorable prognosis. Its manifestations are: full consciousness, clear utterance, bright eyes, lustrous face, sharp response, natural posture, easy breath, fine-looking flesh, and regular urination and defecation.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.4；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2-3；en_pdf_pages=216-217；zh_pdf_pages=493-493；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肝肾精气充足，则瞳神明亮，反应灵敏，体态自如I。脾肺精气充足、则气息平顺、肌肉不削。
en: Among them, full consciousness and clear utterance result from sufficient vital essence of the heart; bright eyes, sharp response and natural posture from abundant vital essence of the liver and kidneys; and easy breath and fine-looking flesh from abundant vital essence of the spleen and lungs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.4；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=216-217；zh_pdf_pages=493-493；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 总之，有神是正气允足，神气旺盛的表现。
en: In short, possession of vitality is a manifestation of abundant vital essence and active life activities.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.4；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=5；en_pdf_pages=216-217；zh_pdf_pages=493-493；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 是脏腑精气亏损的表现。病人出现失神，说明病情严重。
en: Loss of vitality is a manifestation of the impairment of the vital essence and Qi in the Zang-Fu organs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.5；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=217-217；zh_pdf_pages=493-493；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 意识不清，表情淡漠，面色无华，是心的精气衰败的表现。
en: Its main manifestations are: unconsciousness, apathetic expression, dull look in the eyes, lustreless complexion, sluggish response, faint breath, emaciation.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.5；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=217-217；zh_pdf_pages=493-493；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 目光杲滞，反应迟钝，是肝肾精气衰败的表现。呼吸微弱，是肺的精气衰败的表现。
en: Among them, unconsciousness, apathetic expression and lustreless complexion are caused by exhaustion of vital essence of the heart; dull look in the eyes and sluggish response by exhaustion of vital essence of the live and kidneys; faint breath by exhaustion of vital essence of the lungs; and emaciation by exhaustion of vital essence of the spleen.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.5；zh_sentence_span=5-6；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=217-217；zh_pdf_pages=493-493；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 色泽是脏腑气血荣养于外出见中学认为，常人的色泽应当是光明润泽的，虽然；出人种、禀赋和某些主理活动而有所不同，但只要含蓄明润有光泽，即为正常色人在疾病状态时表现的色泽为病色，其特点是，或暗淡无泽。或鲜明暴露，或虽明润含蓄而失时、失处。
en: Colour and lustre are regarded as the outward manifestation of ability of Qi-blood in the Zang-Fu organs to nourish body surface. TCM holds that the complexion of a healthy person is shiny and lustrous, and is considered normal, as long as it remains so even though it differs much in different races, natural endowment and some physiological functions. The complexion of a patient in a morbid state is said to be sickly which is characterized by darkness and lustrelessness, or excessive brighteness and distinctness, or failure to correspond to appro priate seasons and relevant regions of the Zang-Fu-organs in spite of its brightness and lustre.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.7；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2-4；en_pdf_pages=218-218；zh_pdf_pages=493-494；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 白色，是气血亏少，不能荣养于面的表现，主虚证。寒证和失血。
en: The white complexion is manifestation of deficiency of both Qi and blood and their poor supply to the face, indicating deficiency syndrom, cold sydrome and loss of blood.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.8；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=218-219；zh_pdf_pages=494-494；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多与脾病有关，是脾失健运，水湿内停，或气血不充的表现。
en: The yellow complexion s frequently related to a spleen disorder and is a manifestation of dysfunction of the spleen in trans- port, retention of water within the body or deficiency of Qi and blood.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.9；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=219-219；zh_pdf_pages=494-494；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 气血不通则痛，筋脉失养则惊风抽搐，所以青色是寒证、痛证、瘀血和惊风的征象。
en: Moreover, stagnation of Qi and blood. leads to pain and malnutrition of the tendons and vessel, to convulsion and spasm. Therefore, the bluish complexion is a sign of cold syndrome, pain syndroms, blood stasis and convulsion.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.11；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2-3；en_pdf_pages=220-220；zh_pdf_pages=495-495；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 耳薄干枯，为肾精不足；耳轮干枯焦黑者，多见于温病后期，肾水亏极之时；耳背见有红络伴根部发凉，多为麻疹先兆；耳轮甲错，为久病血瘀或有肠痈；耳内印聍腺分泌过多，阻塞耳道者，为取咛；耳内流脓，色黄或白或赤，称为脓耳，即化脓性中耳炎，多由风热上壅，或肝胆湿热所致。
en: The red collateral at the back of the auricle, accompanied by the cold sulcus auriculae posterior, is often considered as a premonitory symptom of measles. Squamous and dry helix is seen in blood stasis formed in a protracted disease or in acute appendicitis. Profuse cerumen blocking external acoustic meatus is known as ceruminosis, and pus flowing in the ear, yellow, white or reddish in colour as otopysis, or otitis media suppurative, resulting mostly from the upward invasion of wind-heat or damp-heat in the liver and gallbladder.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.16；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=3-5；en_pdf_pages=223-224；zh_pdf_pages=496-496；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 鼻为肺之窍。鼻红肿生疮、为血热；鼻内瘾肉，闭塞孔窍，为肺气热极或风湿郁滞所致；鼻头色红生粉刺者，称酒渣鼻，多因脾胃有热，及于血分；鼻柱溃烂。多见于梅毒病人；鼻柱塌陷，眉毛稀疏者，为嘛风；鼻翼煽动，多为肺热壅盛；久病鼻煽，喘而汗出，可能是肺气败绝的临终表现。
en: The red and swollen nose with sores is a sign of blood--heat. A stuffy nose due to nasal polyp is attributable to extreme heat in the lungs or stagnation of wind-dampness. The flushing apex nasi with acnes, named rosacea, is usually caused by the pathogenic heat in the spleen and stomach spreading to the blood stream.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.17；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=2-4；en_pdf_pages=224-224；zh_pdf_pages=497-497；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肺胃肾的病变可反映在咽喉部。望咽喉主要观察有无红肿、白膜及膜液。
en: The disorders of the lungs, stomach and kidneys may be reflected on the throat, observation of which aims chiefly at finding out whether there are redness and swelling, white membrane and its liquid secretion on the pharynx and larynx.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.20；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=226-226；zh_pdf_pages=497-498；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肤色红赤如涂丹，为心火；风热内窜营血，称丹毒；下肢红肿，多为湿热下注；皮肤发黄，可见于黄疸；皮肤润泽者，为肺津充足；皮肤干燥，汗毛脆落者，是肺津已伤；皮枯如鱼鳞，称肌肤甲错，多由瘀血或内生痈肿所致；全身浮肿者为肿，单纯腹部鼓起者称胀。
en: The bright paint-like red skin is seen in erysipelas due to invasion of blood by the heart-fire and pathogenic wind -heat. The red and swollen lower limbs indicate the downward flow of damp-heat; and the yellow-brown pigmentation of the skin can be seen in jaundice. The moist and lustrous skin suggests plenty of body fluid in the lungs, but, on the contrary, the dry skin with shedding of the vellus hairs, inadequacy of body fluid.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.21；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2-4；en_pdf_pages=226-227；zh_pdf_pages=498-498；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 皮肤色红呈片状，不高出皮肤为斑，是肺胃之热由肌肉而出所致。色红如粟状，高出皮肤者为疹，为肺胃之热由皮肤而发。
en: The red discolored patch on the skin that is located not above it is known as macula by the outward dispersion of the pathogenic heat in the lungs and stomach from the muscles, white the red and millet-like spots located above the skin, as papula caused by outward dispersion of the pathogenic heat in the lungs and stomach from the skin.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.22；zh_sentence_span=2-3；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=227-227；zh_pdf_pages=498-498；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 出现白瘩，是湿郁外泄的表现。
en: Therefore, miliaria alba is referred to as a manifestation of outward flow of the stagnated dampness.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.23；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=228-228；zh_pdf_pages=498-498；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 晶莹饱满，色白点细的，称为晶瘩，为顺证，表示正气充足；色枯白无液者，称为枯瘩，为逆证，表示津液枯竭，病情较重。
en: In morbid condition, the plump-eared miliaria, whitish in color and small in size, is called crystalline miliaria suggesting a favorable prognosis because of the abundance of vital Qi, conversely, the shrivelled miliaria without any fluid in it is called dried miliaria indicating an unfavorable prognosis of a serious case due to exhaustion of body fluid.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.23；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=228-228；zh_pdf_pages=498-498；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 因湿温病，湿蕴热伏，难以一时透达，故白瘩常反复出现。
en: Moreover the miliaria occurring in the damp-warm syndrome probably repeatedly, because it is difficult for miliaria alba to erupt thoroughly due to blockage of the retained heat by dampness.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.23；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=5；en_pdf_pages=228-228；zh_pdf_pages=498-498；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 望舌可以判断正气的盛衰，分辨病位的深浅，区别病邪的性质，推断病情的进退。
en: By observation of the tongue a physician can predict the vicissitudes of vital Qi, detect the depth of the location of illness, determine the nature of pathogenic factors, and infer the severity of disease.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.24；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=228-229；zh_pdf_pages=499-499；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 因此，舌诊在中医望诊中占有极重要的地位。
en: Hence, it plays an extremely important role in diagnosis in TCM.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.24；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=5；en_pdf_pages=228-229；zh_pdf_pages=499-499；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 舌质，即舌的本体，由舌之肌肉、血脉，经络组成。舌质与体内许多脏器通过经络相联系，靠脏腑化生的气血津液以温煦和荣养，所以脏腑精气的盛衰变化可以通过舌质的神、色、形态等,各方面的改变表现出来，因此，望舌质在疾病的诊断、判断预后方面都有非常重要的意义。
en: The tongue proper or the tongue body, consists of muscles, vessels, channels and collaterals in the tongue Owing to its connections with many viscera through the meridians, the tongue proper relies on Qi and blood and body fluid transformed by the Zang-Fu organs for warmth and nutrition, thus the condition of vital essence of the Zang-Fu organs can be learned by observing the mobility colour, size, shape of the tongue proper. As a result, inspection of the tongue body is of great importance in making diagnosis and predicting of disease.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.25；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1-2；en_pdf_pages=229-229；zh_pdf_pages=499-499；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 舌色较正常为淡称为淡白舌。主虚寒证和气血两虚证。
en: A tongue lighter than normal is known as pale tongue which principally indicates cold syndrome of insufficiency type and deficiency of both Qi and blood.

entities.en: deficiency of both Qi and blood

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.26；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=229-229；zh_pdf_pages=499-499；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 是热盛血涌，脉络充盈的表现。
en: It is a manifestation of fullness of collateral vessels with blood surge due to overabundance of heat.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.27；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=230-230；zh_pdf_pages=499-499；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 脾虚不运，水湿停阻于舌体，所以舌体较正常为大，故齿痕舌主病以脾虚和湿盛为主。
en: Since the puffiness of the tongue is due to retention of water-damp within the tongue body caused by dysfunction of the spleen in transport the indented tongue mainly indicates hypofunction of the spleen and excessive dampness.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.33；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=233-233；zh_pdf_pages=501-501；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 其主病为：热入心包，高热伤津，痰浊内阻，中风或中风先兆。
en: This morbid tongue is chiefly seen in appolexy or premonitory symptoms of apoplexy due to an attack of the pericardium by excessive heat with body fluid involved and stagnation of phlegm in the interior.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.35；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=234-234；zh_pdf_pages=501-502；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 因热盛者，舌质多见深红；因痰浊者，舌多胖而苔厚腻；见于中风者，舌多淡红或青紫。
en: To sum up, the deep red and stiff tongue usually indicates intense heat, the puffy and stiff tongue with the thick greasy fur often suggests phlegm -dampness, and pink or bluish-purplish tongue with rigidity is mostly seen in apoplexy.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.35；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=234-234；zh_pdf_pages=501-502；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 吐弄舌是吐舌和弄舌的合称。因二者皆因心脾有热、故二者合在一起。
en: The wagging tongue is a collective term for the protruding tongue and played tongue, both of which are caused by pathogenic heat in the heart and spleen, with the former referring to frequent protrusion of the tongue and the latter to slight protrusion and frequent draw back of the tongue, or lick of the lips and corners of the mouth by the tongue.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.37；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=235-236；zh_pdf_pages=502-502；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 舌伸出口外者为吐舌，舌微露出口，时而缩回口内，或用舌舔擦口唇四周者为弄舌。心脾有热力津伤，故舌体动摇。
en: Generally speaking, the tongue moving incessantly indicates the excessive heat in the heart and spleen leading to occurrence of eind syndrome with consumption of body fluid.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.37；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=235-236；zh_pdf_pages=502-502；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 吐舌多见于疫毒攻心，或正气已绝，常伴全舌青紫。弄舌是风的征象，所以多见于动风先兆，或小儿先天不足、发育迟缓，智能低下的痴呆儿。
en: The frequent protrusion of the tongue is usually seen in cases of attack of the heart by the pestilential heat or exhaustion of the vital Qi often accompanied by the bluish-purplish tongue proper, and playing with the tongue is considered as a sign of wind syndrome, mostly seen as a premonitory sign of convulsions or in infants with congenital hypoplasia with poor mental development, or in idiotic infants with mental retardation.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.37；zh_sentence_span=5-6；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=235-236；zh_pdf_pages=502-502；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 伸舌时，舌偏斜于一侧而不能自主者，称为歪斜舌。多以舌体的前半部歪斜明显，或偏左、或偏右。
en: A tongue turning to one side involuntarily while protruding is called the wry tongue, in most cases with marked inclination of the anterior half of the tongue to either the left or the right side.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.38；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=236-236；zh_pdf_pages=502-502；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多因肝风内动，挟痰或痰瘀上阻，使舌体的一侧经络阻滞不通所致。
en: This morbid tongue is mostly caused by obstruction of the collaterals on one side of the tongue body due to the liver-wind stirring up inside the body with upward stagnation of phlegm or phlegm-blood stasis.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.38；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=236-236；zh_pdf_pages=502-502；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 受限一侧、舌肌迟缓，软弱无力，而健侧肌肉收缩正常，所以伸舌时舌伸向健侧，属中风或中风先兆。
en: Since the muscles on the affected side of the tongue are sluggish and weak and those on the healthy side contract normally, the tongue turns to the healthy side while protruding, indicating apoplexy or a premonitory sign of apoplexy.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.38；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=236-236；zh_pdf_pages=502-502；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 舌苔，是舌体上的一层苔状物，由胃气熏蒸而成。
en: The tongue fur is a layer of fur-like substance covering the surface of the tongue and formed under the steaming action of the stomach-Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.39；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=236-237；zh_pdf_pages=503-503；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 望舌苔包括望苔质和苔色两部分。
en: Observation of the tongue fur includes that of the proper of the fur and that of color of the longue coating.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.39；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=236-237；zh_pdf_pages=503-503；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 正常时，舌苔色白，颗粒均匀，薄薄地铺于舌面，其下有根，不粘不腻。
en: A normal fur, white in colour and even in distribution is spread thinly on the surface of the tongue, with its root underneath preventing it from being sticky and greasy.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.39；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=236-237；zh_pdf_pages=503-503；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 病理性舌苔则因病邪外袭，或内有停痰食积所致。
en: On the other hand, a morbid tongue fur is caused by invasion by exogenous pathogens or retention of phlegm and food inside the body.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.39；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=236-237；zh_pdf_pages=503-503；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 诊察舌苔，主要从颜色、津液、厚薄、形态和分布等方面的变化并结合舌质来进行，它有助于了解病邪的性质和深浅，津液的存亡，是舌诊的重要内容之一。
en: Inspection of the tongue fur is mainly made by observing its colour, moisture, thickness, appearance and distribution in combination with ob servation of the tongue proper. It is one of the important parts of tongue inspection, which furnishes information about the condi. tion of body fluid as well as the nature and location of pathogens.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.39；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=5-6；en_pdf_pages=236-237；zh_pdf_pages=503-503；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 见于表证，是外感初起，邪气尚未传里，舌苔无明显变化的结果；寒证或寒湿之证，苔多白而湿润；舌上白苔满布，如白粉堆积，拍之不燥者，称为积粉苔，是由外感秽浊不正之气，毒热内盛所致，常见于温疫或内痈；苔白燥裂如砂，扪之粗糙，是温病化热迅速，内热暴起，津液暴伤，苔未及转黄所致。
en: In the latter case, however, the white, moist fur spreading over the tongue like the heaped powder, but not being dry while palpated is called the powder-like fur, as a result of affection by exogenous filthy-turbid pathogens or excessive pathogenic heat in the body. It is often seen in pestilence of abscess of internal organs. In addition, the white and dry fur like sand, being rough while palpated, is due to sudden onset of inter. nal heat and swift cbnsumption of body fluid, leading to failure of the white fur to be in time transformed into yellow because of rapid conversion of the epidemic febrile disease into heat.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.40；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=3-5；en_pdf_pages=237-237；zh_pdf_pages=503-503；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 薄苔是由胃气上熏，津液上承，聚于否面而成；厚苔常因胃气上升，挟食浊、痰湿等，积滞于面所致。
en: The former is formed by upward aggregation of body fluid on the tongue surface due to upward steaming of the stomach-Qi, and the latter, however, by upward retention of phlegm-dampness and food-drink on the surface of the tongue due to rising up of the stomach-Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.44；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=239-240；zh_pdf_pages=504-504；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 薄苔多见于正常人或病在表，苔未及变化者、厚苔多示胃肠内有宿食积滞，主病在里。
en: The former is mostly seen in a healthy person or a patient having an exterior syndrome with the fur left unchanged, while the latter, in most cases, suggests an interior syndrome due to retention of phlegm, dampness, food and others in the gaslrointestinal tract.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.44；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=239-240；zh_pdf_pages=504-504；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 舌苔山薄增厚，为邪盛病进，预后较差；舌苔山厚转薄，则表示正气渐复，邪气渐退，预后良好。
en: The fur gettig thicker and thicker indicates uniavorable pronos is due to aggravation of a disease owing to exuberant pathogens. On the contrary, the fur getting thinner and thinner suggests a favorable prognosis due to predominance of vital Qi and gradual decline of the pathogen.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.44；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=6-7；en_pdf_pages=239-240；zh_pdf_pages=504-504；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 总之，舌苔厚薄可判断邪气的深浅。
en: In short, the severity and location of the pathogens can be judged by the thickness of the tongue fur.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.44；zh_sentence_span=6；en_sentence_span=8；en_pdf_pages=239-240；zh_pdf_pages=504-504；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 在某些特殊情况下，也有湿证见燥苔，或燥证见混苔者、当四诊合参。
en: In some special circumstances, the dry fur may also be seen in dampness syndrome, and the glossy fur in dryness syndrome.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.45；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=5；en_pdf_pages=240-240；zh_pdf_pages=504-504；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 整个舌面光洁如镜者，为镜面舌：剥落不全，仅在舌中心有苔者，为鸡心苔；舌苔剥落如地图样者、为地图苔：舌面片存舌苔者为花剥苔。
en: A furless tongue as smooth as a mirror is named mirror-like tongue; the partly exfoliating fur only with the center of the tongue surface coated is called chicken heart-like fur; the exfoliating fur as interlocking as a map is known as a map-like tongue; and a scanty and scattered fur on the tongue surfa? is called lingua geographica.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.47；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=241-242；zh_pdf_pages=505-505；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 但青苔剥落之后，复生薄白苔，是邪去正胜，胃气渐复的佳象。
en: On the contrary, the regeneration of a thin and white fur after being stripped off is regarded as favorable sign of conquest of pathogens by vital Qi and gradual recovery of the stomach-Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.47；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=5；en_pdf_pages=241-242；zh_pdf_pages=505-505；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 由耳鼻口眼分泌的液体为分泌物；人体排于体外的为排泄物。
en: Fluids secreled from the ears, nose, mouth and eyes are known as secretions, whereas waste materials eliminated from the body as excretions.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.48；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=242-242；zh_pdf_pages=505-505；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 一般来说，排出物色清质稀的、多为虚证、寒证；色赤质稠者。多属热证、实证；色泽发黑，而挟有块状物者，多为血瘀。
en: Generally speaking, the clear and watery discharges indicate deficiency syndrome and cold syndrome, whereas the dark (or red) and thick discharges, heat syndrome and excess syndrome. In addition, the blackish discharges mingled with some lumps of objects are usually attributable to blood stasis.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.48；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=5-6；en_pdf_pages=242-242；zh_pdf_pages=505-505；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 呕吐的原因有别，呕吐物的性质及伴随症状亦不同。
en: Vomiting due to different causes can produce vomitus of different shape and nature and different accompanying symptoms and signs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.50；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=243-244；zh_pdf_pages=506-506；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 大便清稀，完谷不化，或如鸭溏者，属寒湿困脾，或脾胃气虚，运化失职、水停肠间，大肠传导失职；大便深黄如糜，其味恶臭者，为湿热蕴于大肠；大便如粘胨，赤白相间者、为痢疾，是湿热内结大肠，与气血相搏所致，脓多色白者偏湿，病在气分、血多色赤者偏热，病在血分；先便后血，其色紫暗者，为远血，多属脾胃虚弱；先血后便，血色鲜红者，为近血，可见于因风热灼伤肺络所致的肠风下血和痔疮、肛裂出血等。
en: Loose stool and diarrhea with indigested food or stool resembling duck feces are due to disturbance of the spleen by cold-dampness or insufficiency of Qi of both the spleen and the stomach, bringing about their dysfunction in transportation and transformation and retention of body fluid in the intestines due to their failure to receive and transport foodstuffs; dark yellow, foul and sticky stool indicates accumulation of dampheat in the intestines; red-white mixed and mucous stool is brought about by dysentery due to accumulation of pathogenic damp-heat in the large intestine and intrusion upon both Qi and blood; the whitish stool with profuse pus indicates excessive dampness in the Qisystem; and the dark purplish blood defecated following feces implies bleeding from distant part known as"distant bleeding"due to weakness of the spleen and stomach, while bright red blood defecated before feces is called"nearby bleeding", often seen in hemorrhage from hemorrhoids, and anal fissure or hemalochezia due to impairment of the lung collaterals by pathogenic wind-heat.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.51；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=244-244；zh_pdf_pages=506-506；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 尿中带血称为血淋；尿液混浊如膏脂，多为湿浊膏淋；尿挟砂石，尿赤涩痛，时时中断者，多为砂淋。
en: Urine mixed with blood is called"stranguria complicated by hematuria"; cloudy urine like oil is often known as "stranguria marked by chyluria"; and urine mixed with sand-like or stonelike objects accompanied by burning pain in the urethra on micturition and urinary stuttering is often referred to as "stranguria due to urinary stone".
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.52；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=245-245；zh_pdf_pages=506-506；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 主要用于三岁以下的小儿，因其皮肤薄嫩，显而易见之故。
en: This method is mainly used in children under three years of age because of their tender skin, which makes the venules quite visible.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.53；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=245-246；zh_pdf_pages=507-507；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 望小儿指纹主要观察纹色、纹位和纹形，正常指纹在食指掌指横纹附近，从近至外分别分为风关、气关和命关，分别位于第一、二、三指节，色淡红，隐隐显露。
en: Normal superficial venules of the index finger are near the transverse crease between the palm and the index finger, and extending from the proximal to the outside are Fengguan (wind-pass). Qiguan (Qi-pass) and Mingguan (life-pass) refering to the superficial venules visible on the proximal, middle and distant segment of the infant's index finger, and becoming reddish and faintly visible on the proximal middle and distant segment respectively.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.53；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=4-5；en_pdf_pages=245-246；zh_pdf_pages=507-507；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 总之，病在风关为轻，在气关为重，在命关最为危重。
en: To sum up, the superficial venules emerging at Fengguan, Qiguan and Mingguan are indicative of a mild, serious and critical condition respectively.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.55；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=246-247；zh_pdf_pages=507-507；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 指纹浮露者，主病在表，多见于外感表证；沉伏不明显者，主病在里；纹细而色淡者，多为虚证；纹粗而色浓滞的，多为实证。
en: Visible venules indicate the exterior syndrome, often seen in diseases due to exogenous pathogens; and invisible venules, the interior syndrome. Thin and light-coloured venules often denote deficiency syndrome and thick and dark-coloured venules, excess syndrome.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.56；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2-3；en_pdf_pages=247-247；zh_pdf_pages=507-508；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 指纹的浮沉还受皮肤厚薄，色泽和形体肥瘦的影响。
en: The emerging degree of the superficial venules is also affected by the thickness and colour of skin, and the type of build as well.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.56；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=247-247；zh_pdf_pages=507-508；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 皮肤薄者，指纹显而易见，易成浮纹，皮肤厚者，易成沉纹，肥胖者纹深，瘦弱者纹浅，因此，要结合其它材料，才能定指纹浮沉的临床意义。
en: For example, the thin skin, where venules are easily visible, shows supersficial venules, and the thick skin, deep venules. A fat person presents deep venules while a thin person, superficial ones. Consequently diagnosis can only be made in combination with other clinical data.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.56；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=5-7；en_pdf_pages=247-247；zh_pdf_pages=507-508；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 中医学认为，人体的各种声音和气味都是在脏腑的生理、病理活动中产生的，所以能反映脏腑的生理、病理变化。
en: According to traditional Chinese medicine, all the sounds and odors from the human body, produced in the course of physiological and pathological activities of Zang-Fu organs, may reflect their physiological and pathological changes.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.57；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=247-248；zh_pdf_pages=508-508；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 听声音。主要听患者语音的高低、强弱等变化、以及咳嗽、呕叱、呃逆、嗳气等声响的异常、以分辨病情的寒热虚实。嗅气味，主要是嗅病人的病体、口气以及汗痰等排出物的异常，以辨别病证。
en: Here, listening consists mainly of that of various changes of the patient's speech or voice (high or low, strong or weak), as well as abnormal sounds accompanying cough, vomiting, hiccup or eructation, etc. in order to determine the nature of a disease, such as cold or heat syndrome, and deficiency or excess syndrome; while smelling involves that of various odors of the patient's body, mouth and such excretions as sweat and phlegm in order to differentiate diseases.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.57；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=247-248；zh_pdf_pages=508-508；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 宗气能行呼吸，与语音亦密切相关。
en: The pectoral Qi has also a close relation with the voice due to its capability of promoting respiration.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.58；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=248-248；zh_pdf_pages=508-508；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 无论外感内伤，只要影响到气的正常活动、或影响到发音器宫时，就会导致声音的改变、故听声音可了解内脏和整体的变化。
en: Once normal activities of Qi are affected whetber by exogenous pathogens or by internal injury, or vocal organs are affected, the voice is likely to become abnormal. As a result, listening to the voice can detect changes of internal organs and the body as a whole.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.58；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=4-5；en_pdf_pages=248-248；zh_pdf_pages=508-508；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 鼻塞流清涕，恶寒无汗者。为外感风寒；脘闷身重者、为湿邪内困；呻吟惊呼、多见于疼痛之证；新病音哑。为邪客会厌；久病失音，为肺肾不足，妊娠音喑，多为正常。
en: Low voice speaking accompanied by stuffy and running nose and chilliness without sweating are indicative of affection by exogenous wind-cold; deep and indistinct voice associated with the feeling of oppression over the epigastrium and heaviness sensation of the limbs are caused by retention of pathogenic dampness; moaning and screaming are seen in pain-syndrome; hoarseness in a new disorder is due to invasion of the epiglottis by pathogens; phònia after prolonged disease suggests insufficiency of the lungs and kidneys, and huskiness during pregnancy is mostly considered normal.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.59；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=248-249；zh_pdf_pages=508-508；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 气息低微，气少不足以息的，叫少气、多因肺肾气虚所致；气息有力，声高而粗，称息粗，是邪热壅肺所致；呼吸困难，短促急迫，其则张口抬肩，鼻翼煽动，不能平卧者为喘。
en: For instance, feeble breathing with lack of strength for respiration is called insufficiency of Qi, often due to deficiency off vital Qi of both the lungs and kidneys. Strong coarse and loud breathing is called rude respiration brought about by accumulation of pathogenic heat in the lungs; rapid shallow breathing or difficulty in respiration, even with opened mouth and elevated shoulders, flaring of nares and inability to lie flat, is called dyspnea which is classified into excess-type and deficiency-type, the former referring to loud and coarse breathing with comfortable sensation upon expiration and the latter to weak and low breathing with difficulty in going on respiration.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.60；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2-3；en_pdf_pages=249-249；zh_pdf_pages=508-509；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 咳嗽是肺失清肃、肺气上逆的表现。
en: Cough is a manifestation of impairment of purifying and descending function of the lungs leading to adverse rising of the lung-Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.61；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=250-250；zh_pdf_pages=509-509；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 听咳嗽，主要是注意咳嗽的声响及咳痰的量、色、质的变化，以辨别病证的寒热虚实。
en: Listening to cough, a doctor should focus his attention on cough sound and changes in amount, colour and quality of the sputum in order to differentiate cold or heat syndrome, and deficiency or excess syndrome of a disease.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.61；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=250-250；zh_pdf_pages=509-509；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 身有汗气，是已出汗；汗有腥膻气，为湿热久蕴皮肤所致、鼻出臭气，流浊涕不止者，多为鼻渊证；吐痰带脓血，腥臭异常的为肺痈。
en: The smell of sweat given off from the body im. plies having a perspiration; sweating with smelling of fish or mutton is caused by accumulation of damp-heat in the skin. Fetid odor from nose, with continual turbid nose discharge is often indicative of sinusitis; and expectoration of foul sputum with pus and blood indicates the lung abscess.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.62；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2-3；en_pdf_pages=250-251；zh_pdf_pages=509-509；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 大便臭秽属热，腥气属寒。
en: Fetid stool pertains to heat syndrome while stinking stool to cold syndrome.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.62；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=250-251；zh_pdf_pages=509-509；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 问诊在四诊中占有重要地位，因为病人的病史、白觉症状、家族史、治疗经过、特别是某些只有主观感觉而缺乏体征的疾病必须通过问诊才能了解。
en: Through inquiring, doctors can know the patient's case history, subjective symptoms, family history, therapeutic measures already taken, and especially some kinds of diseases without signs which can only be detected by questioning.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.63；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=251-251；zh_pdf_pages=509-510；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 问诊时应首先抓住病人的主要痛楚，然后围绕它进行有目的、有步骤的问诊，既要重点突出，又要全面了解。
en: During questioning, a doctor should first watch out for the patient's main sufferings, around which he carries on the interrogation purposefully step by step with special emphasis on comprehensive study as well as on key information.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.63；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=251-251；zh_pdf_pages=509-510；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 寒热，指恶寒发热。恶寒是病人的自觉症状，发热是指体温升高，或患者自觉发热。
en: Chilliness is the patient's subiective symptom, and fever refers to an undue rise in body temperature or to the patient's sensation of heat.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.64；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=251-252；zh_pdf_pages=510-510；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 时冷时热，发作无时间规律者、主半表半里证，多兼口苦咽干、目眩等症，是邪正分争，互为进退的表现；寒战与高热交替发作，一日一次或隔日、三日一次者，是为疟疾，兼见头痛剧烈，口渴多汗等症。
en: Alternate chills and fever at irregular intervals. often accompanied by bitter taste in the mouth, dry throat, dizziness, etc, are due to a lingering of the pathogens between the exterior and the interior with a stalemating conflict between the vital Qi and pathogens. The alternate attack of shivers with cold and high fever once a day, or every other day or every three days is called malaria, accompanied by a serious headache, thirst and profuse sweating etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.68；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2-3；en_pdf_pages=254-254；zh_pdf_pages=511-511；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 筋肉皮肤皆赖气血的濡养，经脉是气血运行的通道。
en: The tendons, muscles and skin depend for their nourishment on Qi and blood, which circulate through channels.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.39；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=189-190；zh_pdf_pages=478-479；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。；补充修正：从原教材句对中按语义片段重新抽取/修正，避开严重中英长度比例异常，并复核英文OCR与术语格式。；替换原样本 TCM_TRAIN_0629；替换原因：no_entity_after_auto_extraction；候选来源=train_final_1000_cleaned.xlsx；候选id=TCM_TRAIN_0484。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 疾病时，由于邪气侵扰和正气不足，会出现无汗或汗出过多。
en: Anhidrosis or hyperhidrosis occurs due to invasion of pathogens or deficiency of vital Qi during the disease.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.69；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=254-255；zh_pdf_pages=511-511；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 它是正邪相争，病变发展的转折点，是机体积器正气，努力祛邪外出的表现。
en: It is a turning point of the development of pathological changes and of a conflict between vital Qi and pathogens and also a manifestation of accumulated vital Qi in its struggle for eliminating pathogens.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.73；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=256-256；zh_pdf_pages=512-512；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 汗出⋯侧是健侧，是营卫通利、卫气司开合功能正常的表现；无汗⋯侧是病侧、是经脉阻滞、营卫不得周流、气血不和所致。
en: The sweating side is in a healthy condition, which indicates normal functioning of nutrient Qi and defensive Qi which can govern the open-cose of pores regularly, while the side without sweating is the affected one, caused by blockage of channels, and obstruction of nutrient Qi and defensive Qi as well as incoordination between Qi and blood.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.75；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=257-257；zh_pdf_pages=513-513；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 其病因，是经络阻闭，气血运行不畅所致、即不通则痛，多由感受外邪，或气滞血瘀，或痰浊凝滞而成、属实性疼痛。
en: Firstly, it is caused by stagnant Qi and blood due to blockage of the meridians. In most cases, it is brought about by invasion of exogenous pathogens or Qi stagnancy and blood stasis, or coagulated phlegm all of which lead to pain of excess type.

entities.en: stagnation of Qi and blood stasis

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.77；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=4-5；en_pdf_pages=258-258；zh_pdf_pages=513-513；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: ⋯是气血不足，脏腑组织失养所致、为虚性疼痛。
en: Secondly, it results from malnutrition of Zang-Fu organs and tissues due to deficiency of Qi and blood. This is pain of deficiency type.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.77；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=6-7；en_pdf_pages=258-258；zh_pdf_pages=513-513；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 疼痛的性质、部位和程度不同，反映的邪气的性质和病变部位也不同，故问痛、应重点询问疼痛的性质、部位、程度及恶欲等等。
en: Different nature, location and intensity of pain reflect different nature of pathogens and affected portions of the body. From the above it follows that the stress of questioning should be laid on nature, location, intensity of questioning pain and the patient's likes or dislikes as well.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.77；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=8-9；en_pdf_pages=258-258；zh_pdf_pages=513-513；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 外感内伤皆可导致头痛。
en: Headache may be caused by either exogenous pathogens or internal injury.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.78；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=258-259；zh_pdf_pages=514-514；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 经脉在头部的分布不周、故可根据头痛的部位判断病在何经。
en: Owing to different distribution of the channels in the head, the affected channel can be detected according to the location of pain.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.78；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=258-259；zh_pdf_pages=514-514；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 病程长，头痛缓，时发时止者，多属内伤头痛。头痛绵绵，劳则加重者，为气虚头痛；头晕目眩，面色苍白，为血虚头痛；头脑空痛，腰膝酸软者，为肾虚头痛，由肾精不足，脑髓失养所致。
en: Moderate intermittent headache running a long course usually pertains to pain caused by internal injury, lingering headache, aggravated on exertion, to headache due to Qi-insufficiency; pain accompanied by dizziness and pale complexion. to headache due to blood-deficiency, and that accompanied by an empty sensation in the head and lassitude in the loins and knees, to headache due to kidney-deficiency which is caused by insufficiency of kidney-essence and inability of the brain to be nourished.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.78；zh_sentence_span=6-7；en_sentence_span=6；en_pdf_pages=258-259；zh_pdf_pages=514-514；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肝胆居胁部，故胁痛与肝胆有关。
en: Since the liver and gallbladder are situated in the hypochondriac region, hypochondriac pain is related to these two organs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.80；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=260-261；zh_pdf_pages=514-514；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 脐以上为大腹，为肝胆脾胃居处，故上腹疼痛多与肝胆脾胃有关。
en: The former, situated above umbilicus, contains the liver, gallbladder, spleen and stomach. Pain in the upper abdomen is often related to these organs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.82；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2-3；en_pdf_pages=261-262；zh_pdf_pages=515-515；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 脐以下为小腹，属肾、膀胱、大小肠、胞宫，此处疼痛多与上述脏腑有关。小腹两旁为少腹，由肝经所主，其病多与肝有关。
en: The latter, located below umbilicus, comprises the kidneys, bladder, large and small intestines, and the uterus. Pain in the lower abdomen is often related to the above-mentioned organs, while that in the bilateral lower abdomen, which the liver channels pass by, is usually related to the liver.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.82；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=4-5；en_pdf_pages=261-262；zh_pdf_pages=515-515；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 亦有因脾胃虚弱，四肢失养而疼痛者；若疼痛仅见于足跟，或腰膝酸软疼痛者，多属肾虚。
en: There is also pain o limbs which fail to be nourished due to weakness of the stomact and spleen. If the pain is located only in the heel with lassitude and soreness in the loins and legs, it is usually attributable to deficiency of the kidneys.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.84；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=3-4；en_pdf_pages=262-263；zh_pdf_pages=515-516；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 胸胁脘腹胀痛，时发时止，部位不定者，一般属气滞之证。
en: Intermittent and migrating distending pain of the chest, hypochondrium, epigastrium and abdomen is usually due to the stagnation of Qiwhich is closely related to the function of the liv. er to govern normal flow of Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.85；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=263-263；zh_pdf_pages=516-516；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 疼痛且有重的感觉，谓之重痛。多为湿邪阻滞气机所致，常见于头部、四肢、腰部。
en: Pain with heaviness sensation is usually caused by stagnation of Qi due to pathogenic dampness often appearing in the head, limbs and loins, because dampness is liable to block the functioning of Qi due to its properties of turbidity and viscosity.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.86；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=263-263；zh_pdf_pages=516-516；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 疼痛剧烈，犹如刀割，叫绞痛，多因有形实邪骤然闭阻气机，或因寒邪凝滞，气机阻闭所致。
en: Violent pain as if cutting by knife is generally caused by sudden blockage of Qi due to substantial pathogens or coagulation by pathogenic cold.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.88；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=264-264；zh_pdf_pages=516-516；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。
