en: It is a morbid condition due to fluid-retention in the stomach and intestines, manifested as fullness sensation in the chest, splashing sound in the stomach, vomiting clear thin saliva, dizziness, palpitation, shortness of breath, whitish slippery fur of the tongue, and taut slippery pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.46；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=312-312；zh_pdf_pages=544-544；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 可见于幽门狭窄所致的胃潴留、积液性肠梗阻、胃肠功能失调等。
en: It can be seen in gastric retention due to pyloric obstruction, intestinal obstruction due to dropsy, and functional disturbance of the stomach and intestines.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.46；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=312-312；zh_pdf_pages=544-544；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 悬饮证是饮邪停留于胁肋的证候。临床表现为胁痛，咳唾更甚，转侧、呼吸均牵引作痛，肋间胀满，气短息促，脉沉弦。
en: It is a syndrome of fluid-retention in the hypochondrium, manifested as pain over the hypochondriac region, which is aggravated by coughing or spitting, dragging pain upon turning over in bed or breathing, fullness sensation over the chest, shortness of breath, deep taut pulse, often seen in exudative pleuritis.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.47；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=312-312；zh_pdf_pages=545-545；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 溢饮证是水饮流溢于四肢肌腠的证候。临床表现为肢体沉重而疼痛，甚则浮肿，小便不利，或见发热恶寒，无汗，咳吐白沫痰，舌苔白，脉弦紧。
en: It is a morbid condition of accumulation of fluid in the subcutaneous tissue, manifested as heaviness and pain in the limbs, even edema, oliguria, or fever and aversion to cold, no sweat, cough with frothy sputum, whitish fur of the tongue, and taut tense pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.48；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=312-313；zh_pdf_pages=545-545；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 支饮证是水饮停留于膈上的证候。临床表现为胸闷气短，咳逆，倚息不能平卧，咯吐白痰多沫，面部浮肿，舌苔白腻，脉弦紧。
en: It is a mordid condition of accumulation of excessive fluid above the diaphragm manifested as oppressien sensaticn in the chest, shortness of breath, cough with dyspnea, difficulty in assuming a supine position, cough with whitish frothy sputum, fa, cial edema, whitish greasy fur of the tongue, and taut tense pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.49；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=313-313；zh_pdf_pages=545-545；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 脏腑辨证是根据脏腑的生理功能、病理表现，对疾病症候进行分析归纳，借以推究病机，判断疾病的部位，性质、正邪盛衰状况的一种辨证方法，是临床各科的诊断基础，是辨证体系重要的组成部分。
en: It is a method of differential diagnosis to determine the pathogenesis, nature and site of a disease and the conflict between body resistance and pathogens based on the analysis and conprehension of the symptoms in light of the physiological functions and pathological manifestations of the Zang-Fu organs. As an important component of the differential diagnosis system, it serves as the basis of diagnosis for all clinical specialties of TCM.

entities.en: differential diagnosis according to theory of Zang-Fu organs

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.50；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1-2；en_pdf_pages=313-313；zh_pdf_pages=545-545；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 脏腑辨证包括脏病辨证、腑病辨证以及脏腑兼病的辨证。
en: This method, which lays the foundation for all other methods of differential diagnosis, includes differential diagnosis of Zang-organ diseases, of Fu-organ diseases, and of diseases of both Zang-organs and Fu-organs.

entities.en: differential diagnosis according to theory of Zang-Fu organs

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.50；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=313-313；zh_pdf_pages=545-545；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多因七情郁结，气郁化火、或火热之邪内侵，或过食辛热、温补之品而致。临床表现为心中烦热，失眠，面赤口渴，口舌生疮，或见小便赤涩刺痛，尿血，或见狂躁谵语，舌尖红，甚至生芒刺，脉数有力。
en: It refers to a morbid condition due to hyperactivity of the heart-fire in the interior, usually resulting from production of fire due to emotional upsets and stagnancy of Qi, or invasion of the interior by the pathogenic fire, or excessive intake of hot-natured food of acrid taste or warm-natured tonics, and manifested as dysphoria with feverish restless sensation in the thorax insomnia, flushed face, thirst, ulcers of the mouth and tongue, or difficult and painful urination with dark urine, hematuria or mania and delirium, redness of the tip of the tongue, or even rough and prickle-like fur of the tongue, and rapid forceful pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.55；zh_sentence_span=2-3；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=315-315；zh_pdf_pages=546-546；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多情志不遂，气郁生：或感受湿浊邪气，闭阻心窍而致。临床表现为精神抑郁，表懿淡漠，神志痴呆，喃喃自语、举止失常。
en: It refers to impairment of consciousness caused by invasion of the heart by phlegm, usually resulting from production of phlegm due to emotional upsets, and stagnation of Qi, or coagulation of the pathogenic dampness in the heart, manifested as mental depression, apathy, aphrenia, soliloquy, improper behaviour, or sudden falling down with loss of consciousness, laryngeal rales, whitish greasy fur of the tongue, and slippery pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.56；zh_sentence_span=2-3；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=315-316；zh_pdf_pages=546-547；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 痰火扰心证或由千情志不遂，思虑郁怒，气郁化火，炼液为痰，痰火犯扰心神而致；或由于外感热邪，热灼津液为痰，痰火内扰而引起。
en: It is a morbid condition of mental disturbance due to phlegm-fire, caused by emotional upsets, mental depression and anger, leading to stagnation of Qi and production of fire which transforms fluid into phlegm, or by invasion of the heart by pathogenic heat which converts fluid into phlegm.

entities.en: syndrome of phlegm-fire attacking the heart

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.57；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=316-316；zh_pdf_pages=547-547；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为发热，呼吸气粗，面红目赤，咯痰黄稠，喉间痰鸣、躁狂谵语，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数。或见失眠心烦，痰多胸闷，头晕目眩，或见语言错乱，哭笑无常，狂躁妄动，打人毁物，骂詈不避亲疏，登高而歌，弃衣而走，力逾常人。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: fever, raucous breathing, flushed face, congested eyes, expectoration of yellowish thick phlegm, laryngeal rales, delirium, red tongue with yellowish greasy fur, slippery rapid pulse, or insomnia, irritability, profuse sputum, feeling of oppression in the chest, dizziness, or paraphasia, and various manifestations of mania.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.57；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=316-316；zh_pdf_pages=547-547；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 痰火扰心证，其中外感热病以高热、痰盛、神志不清为辨证要点；内伤杂病中，轻者以心烦失眠，重者以神志狂乱为辨证要点。
en: If the syndrome is caused by invasion by the pathogenic heat, the chief signs for differential diagnosis are high fever, abundant expectoration, and unconsciousness. If the syndrome is brought about by internal injury, the main ones for diagnosing mild cases are restlessness and insomnia, and those for diagnosing severe cases are mania.

entities.en: syndrome of phlegm-fire attacking the heart

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.57；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=3-4；en_pdf_pages=316-316；zh_pdf_pages=547-547；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多由于久病咳喘，耗伤肺气，或气的化生不足而致。临床表现为咳喘无力，少气不足以息，动则益甚，痰液清稀，语声低怯，面色觥白，神疲倦怠。
en: It is a morbid condition of hypofunction of the lungs, usually resulting from impairment of the lung-Qi due to protracted illness and dyspneic cough, or insufficiency of Qi-production, marked by cough with dyspnea, shortness of breath aggravated on slight exertion, clear thin sputum, low weak voice, pale complexion, lassitude, or spontaneous perspiration, aversion to wind, susceptibility to cold due to exogenous pathogens, pale tongue with whitish fur, and feeble pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.59；zh_sentence_span=2-3；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=317-317；zh_pdf_pages=547-547；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 风寒束肺证是感受风寒，肺气失宜表现出的证候。临床表现为咳嗽，痰稀薄色白，鼻塞流清涕，微微恶寒，轻度发热，无汗，舌苔白，脉浮紧。
en: It is a morbid condition due to invasion of the lungs by the wind-cold pathogen leading to obstruction of the lung-Qi, manifested by cough with whitish thin sputum, stuffy nose with watery discharge, slight aversion to cold, mild fever, no sweat, whitish fur of the tongue, and floating tense pulse.

entities.en: syndrome of wind-cold pathogen tightening the lungs

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.61；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=318-318；zh_pdf_pages=548-548；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 寒邪犯肺证是寒邪内客于肺表现出的证候。临床表现为咳嗽气喘，痰稀色白，形寒肢凉，舌淡苔白，脉迟缓。
en: It is a morbid condition of accumulation of the pathogenic cold in the lungs, manifested as cough with dyspnea, and thin whitish sputum, chilliness and cold limbs, pale tongue with whitish fur, and slow or moderated pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.62；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=318-318；zh_pdf_pages=548-548；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为气喘息粗，咳嗽，痰稠色黄，壮热口褐，烦躁不安，甚则鼻翼煽动，胸痛，咳吐脓血痰腥臭。大便干结，小便短赤，舌红苔黄，脉滑数。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: dyspnea, cough with thick yellowish sputum, high fever, thirst, irritability, even flaring of nares, chest pain, blood and pus-stained sputum with stinking smell, constipation, scanty dark urine, reddish tongue with yellowish fur, and slippery rapid pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.63；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=318-318；zh_pdf_pages=548-548；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 燥邪犯肺证是指秋令感受燥邪，耗伤肺津所出现的证候。临床表现为干咳无痰，或痰少而粘，不易咯出，咳甚则胸痛，口唇、鼻咽干燥，或发热，微恶风寒，舌苔薄而少津，脉细数。
en: It is a syndrome due to affection by pathogenic dryness with impairment of fluid in the lungs in autumn, manifested as dry cough with no sputum or with scanty viscid sputum difficult to be expectorated, chest pain due to violent cough, dry mouth, lips, nose and throat, or fever, slight aversion to wind and cold, thin dry fur of the tongue, and thready rapid pulse.

entities.en: syndrome of attack of the lungs by pathogenic dryness

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.64；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=319-319；zh_pdf_pages=548-548；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 痰湿阻肺证是痰湿阻滞肺系而表现出的证候。常因感受寒湿之邪，肺失宣降，或久咳伤肺，以致肺不布津，聚为痰湿，或因脾气亏虚，输布失常，水湿凝聚为痰，上渍于肺而致。
en: It is a morbid condition of stagnation of phlegm-dampness in the pulmonary system, usually resulting from impairment of dispersing and descending function of the lungs due to attack by pathogenic cold and dampness or accumulation of phlegm-dampness due to impairment of the lungs by protracted cough and dysfunction of the lungs, or stagnation of phlegm in the lungs transformed from water-dampness due to inability of the spleen-Qi to transport body fluid.

entities.en: syndrome of accumulation of phlegm-dampness in the lungs

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.65；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=319-319；zh_pdf_pages=548-549；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为咳嗽痰多，痰白而稀，易于咯出，胸闷，或见气喘痰鸣，舌质淡，苔白腻，脉弦滑或濡缓。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: cough with copious whitish and thin sputum which is easily expectorated, feeling of oppression in the chest, of dyspnea, laryngeal rales, pale tongue with whitish greasy fur, taut and slippery or soft and floating pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.65；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=319-319；zh_pdf_pages=548-549；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 大肠湿热证是指湿邪侵犯大肠所表现出的证候。多因感受湿热外邪，或因饮食不洁，湿热蕴结大肠而发病。
en: It is a syndrome due to invasion of the large intestine by damp-heat, usually resulting from retention of dampness and heat in the large intestine because of affection by exogenous damp-heat pathogen, or intake of unclean food.

entities.en: syndrome of damp-heat in the large intestine

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.66；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=319-320；zh_pdf_pages=549-549；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 伴有肛门灼热，口干不欲饮，小便短赤，或恶寒发热，或但热不寒。舌红，苔黄腻，脉濡数或滑数。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: abdominal pain, diarrhea with purulent and bloody stool, tenesmus, or sudden onset of diarrhea with discharge of yellowish stinking stool, accompanied by burning sensation in the anus, dry mouth without desire for drink, scanty dark urine, or fever with or without aversion to cold, red tongue with greasy yellwish fur, soft and rapid, or slippery and rapid pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.66；zh_sentence_span=4-5；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=319-320；zh_pdf_pages=549-549；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为大便秘结干燥，难以排出、常数日一行，口干咽燥，舌红少津，脉细涩，常伴有口臭、头晕等症。
en: Its clinical manifestation are: constipation (difficult defecation, even one bowel movement in several days), dry mouth and throat, dry red tounge, thready and hesitant pulse: often accompanied by halitosis, dizziness, etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.67；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=320-320；zh_pdf_pages=549-549；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 脾气虚证是指脾气不足，运化失健所表现的证候。脾气虚证多因饮食失调，或劳倦内伤，或其它急慢性疾患耗伤脾气而致。
en: This is a morbid state showing inability of the spleen to transport or transform nutrients due to insufficiency of the spleen-Qi usually caused by improper diet, fatigue, internal injury and consumption of the spleen-Qi by other acute of chronic disorders.

entities.en: syndrome of insufficiency of the spleen-Qi

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.68；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=320-321；zh_pdf_pages=549-549；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为纳少，腹胀，饭后尤甚，大便溏薄，面色萎黄，少气懒言，四肢倦怠，舌质淡，苔白，脉缓弱。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: poor appetite, abdominal distention aggravated after meals, diarrhea or loose stool, sallow complexion, shortness of breath, disinclination to talk due to mental fatigue, lassitude of limbs, pale tongue with whitish fur, slow and weak pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.68；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=320-321；zh_pdf_pages=549-549；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 脾气下陷证是指脾气亏虚，升举无力所表现的证候。多由脾气虚证发展而成。
en: It is a syndrome of inability of insufficient spleen-Qi to rise, resulting mostly from insufficiency of the spleen-Qi or from chronic diarrhea and dysentery, or overstrain.

entities.en: syndrome of collapse of the spleen-Qi
syndrome of insufficiency of the spleen-Qi

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.70；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=321-321；zh_pdf_pages=550-550；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 常伴见少气懒言，倦怠乏力，头晕目眩。舌质淡，苔白，脉弱。
en: It is often accompanied with shortness of breath, disinclination to talk, lassitude, dizziness, pale tongue with whitish fur and weak pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.70；zh_sentence_span=5-6；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=321-321；zh_pdf_pages=550-550；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多因久病脾虚，或劳倦伤脾而致。
en: It is mainly caused by injury to the spleen due to chronic disease or overfatigue.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.71；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=321-322；zh_pdf_pages=550-550；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为便血，崩漏下血，尿血、肌衄，齿衄等，常伴见神倦无力，少气懒言，纳少便溏，面色无华。舌质淡，苔白，脉细弱。
en: Its clinical manifestation are: hemafecia, metrorrhagia, metrostaxis, hematuria, hematohidrosis, gingival hemorrhage; often accompanied with tassitude, shortness of breath, disinclination to talk, poor appetite, loose stool, pale complexion, pale tongue with whitish fur, and thready and weak pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.71；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=321-322；zh_pdf_pages=550-550；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为脘腹胀闷，不思饮食，泛恶欲吐，口淡不渴，腹痛溏泄，头身困重，或肌肤面目发黄，黄色晦暗如烟熏，或肢体浮肿，小便短少。舌淡胖，苔白腻，脉濡缓。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: epigastric distention and stuffiness, poor appetite, nausea, flat taste in the mouth, no thirst, abdominal pain, loose stool, heavy sensation in the head and body, or dim yellow complexion like being smoked, edema of the limbs, oliguria, pale swolen tongue with whitish and greasy fur and soft slow pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.72；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=322-322；zh_pdf_pages=550-550；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为脘腹痞闷，纳呆呕恶，便溏尿黄，肢体困重，或面目肌肤发黄，色泽鲜明如橘子，或身热起伏，汗出热不解。舌红苔黄腻，脉濡数。
en: Its clinical. manifestations are: abdominal distention, poor appetite, nausea, loose stool, yellowish urine, heavy sensation in the limbs, or bright orange complexion of the skin and sclera, irregular paroxysm of fever, not relieved by profuse sweating, red tongue with yellowish and greasy fur, and soft rapid pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.73；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=322-323；zh_pdf_pages=550-550；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 胃寒证是寒邪凝滞胃腑所表现的证候。多由于起居不慎，腹部受凉，或过食生冷，寒凝于胃而致。
en: This is a syndrome due to stagnation of pathogenic cold in the stomach, usually caused by improper mode of living, exposure of the abdomem to cold, or excessive intake of raw or cold food.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.74；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=323-323；zh_pdf_pages=551-551；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为脘腹冷痛，轻则绵绵不已，重则拘急剧痛，得温则痛减，遇冷则加重，口淡不渴，伴见胃院水声漉漉，口泛清水。舌苔白滑，脉迟或弦。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: cold-pain in the epigastrium and abdomen - mild or severe, but relieved by warmth and aggravated by cold, flat taste in the mouth, absence of thirst; often accompanied with rumbling in the stomach, salivation, whitish and slippery fur of the tongue, slow or taut pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.74；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=323-323；zh_pdf_pages=551-551；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 胃热证是胃中火热炽盛所表现的证候。多因平素嗜食辛辣肥甘之品，生热化火，或情志不遂，气郁化火，或热邪内犯而致。
en: It is a syndrome of excessive pathogenic heat in the stomach, caused by invasion of pathogenic fire as a result of excessive intake of acrid fatty and sweet food. stagnation of Qi or emotional depression, etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.75；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=323-324；zh_pdf_pages=551-551；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 或食入即吐，或消谷善饥，或牙龈肿痛溃烂，齿衄。大便秘结，小便短赤，舌红苔黄，脉滑数。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: burning pain in the epigastrium, gastric discomfort with acid regurgitation, thirst with desire for cold drinks, halitosis, vomiting immediately after meals, excessive appetite, inflamed, ulcerated or bleeding gums, constipation, scanty dark urine, red tongue with yellowish fur and slippery and rapid pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.75；zh_sentence_span=4-5；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=323-324；zh_pdf_pages=551-551；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 食滞胃脘证是饮食物停滞胃脘，不能腐熟所表现的证候。多因饮食不节，暴饮暴食，以致食积不化。
en: This is a syndrome indicative of retention of food in the stomach due to its dysfunction in digesting food.generally caused by indigestion due to immoderate eating and drinking.

entities.en: syndrome of retention of indigested food in the stomach

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.76；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=324-324；zh_pdf_pages=551-551；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为胃院胀闷，甚则疼痛，嗳气食臭，呕吐酸腐食物，吐后胀痛减轻，或矢气便溏，泻下物酸腐臭秽。舌苔厚腻，脉滑。
en: Its clinical manifestations include: epigastric distention and stuffiness or even pain, eructation with fout taste and smell, vomiting acid and rotten food with distention and pain relieved after vomiting. or flatulence, loose stool with acid, rotten and foul smelis, thick and greasy fur on the tongue and slippery pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.76；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=324-324；zh_pdf_pages=551-551；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为胃脘隐痛，饥不欲食，干呕呃逆，口咽干燥，大便干结，舌红少苔而干，脉细数。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: dull pain of the epigastrium, hunger with disinclination to eat, belching, hiccup, dry mouth and throat, constipation, red tongue with thin dry fur, and thready rapid pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.77；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=324-324；zh_pdf_pages=551-551；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多因情志不遂，情志抑郁，或突然的精神刺激，以及其它病邪侵扰而致。
en: It usually resuits from emotional depression, abrupt mental irritation and invasion by other pathogens.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.78；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=324-325；zh_pdf_pages=552-552；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 或见颈部瘿瘤，或见腹中癫瘦。妇女可见乳房作胀疼痛，痛经，月经不调，舌苔白，脉弦。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: emotional depression, irritability, stuffiness in the chest, frequent sighing, wandering pain with distension in the chest, hypochondrium and lower abdomen; or sensation of foreign body in the throat which cannot be swallowed or coughed up, goiter, abdominal mass; in women distending pain in breasts, dysmenorrhea. and irregular menstruation. whitish fur on the tongue, and taut pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.78；zh_sentence_span=4-5；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=324-325；zh_pdf_pages=552-552；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多因情志不遂，肝郁化火，或过食辛辣肥甘，蕴热化火而致。
en: It results mostly from an attack of fire due to emotional upsets, stagnation of liver-Qi and excessive intake of acrid, fatty and sweet food, and transformation of accumulated heat into fire.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.79；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=325-325；zh_pdf_pages=552-552；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多因脾肾亏虚，生化之源不足，或失血过多，或久病耗伤肝血而致。临床表现为面白无华，眩晕耳鸣，两目干涩，视物不清，或雀目，肢体麻木，或筋脉拘急，肌肉润动，爪甲不荣。
en: This is a syndrome due to shortage of blood in the liver, resulting mostly from deficiency of both the spleen and kidneys, massive loss of blood or consumption of liver blood because of chronic disorders, Its clinical manifestations are: pallor, dizziness, tinnitus, dryness and discomfort of the eyes, poor sight, night blindness. numbness of the limbs. contracture of the tendons and muscles, muscular twitching, colorless nails; scanty light-colored menstrual discharge or even amenorrhea in females, pale tongue, and thready taut pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.80；zh_sentence_span=2-3；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=325-325；zh_pdf_pages=552-552；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: (2)热极生风证。热极生风证是热邪亢盛，引动肝风所表现的证候。
en: (2) Syndrome of interior wind resulting from overabundance of heat This is a syndrome occurring in case of extreme hyparactivity of pathogenic heat.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.83；zh_sentence_span=7-8；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=326-327；zh_pdf_pages=553-553；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为高热神昏，躁扰不宁，手足抽搐，颈项强直，两目上视，牙关紧闭，甚则角弓反张。舌红或绛，脉弦数。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: high fever, coma, restlessness, convalsion of the limbs, stiff neck, eyeballs turning upwards, lockjaw, or even opisthotonos, red or crimson tongue, and taut rapid pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.83；zh_sentence_span=9-10；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=326-327；zh_pdf_pages=553-553；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: (3)血虚生风证。血虚生风证是血虚筋脉失养所表现的动风的证候。
en: (3) Syndrome of interior wind caused by deficiency of blood This is a morbid condition due to lack of nourishment to the tendons and muscles owing to deficiency of blood stored in the liver.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.83；zh_sentence_span=11-12；en_sentence_span=5；en_pdf_pages=326-327；zh_pdf_pages=553-553；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 具体临床表现见“肝血不足证”。
en: For clinical manifestations refer to the section on "the syndrome of deficiency of the liver-blood".
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.83；zh_sentence_span=13；en_sentence_span=6；en_pdf_pages=326-327；zh_pdf_pages=553-553；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 肝胆湿热证是湿热蕴结肝胆所表现的证候。多由于感受湿热之邪，或嗜食肥甘厚腻，酿生湿热而致。
en: This is a morbid condition due to retention of pathogenic dampness and heal in the liver and the gallbladder, mainly caused by the exogenous damp-heat pathogen or by the damp-heat pathogen produced by excessive intake of fatty, sweet and indigestible food or by accumulation of pathogenic dampness in the body which is transformed into heat due to dysfunction of the spleen in transporting.

entities.en: syndrome of dampness and heat in the liver and the gallbladder

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.84；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=327-328；zh_pdf_pages=553-554；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 寒滞肝脉证是寒邪凝滞肝脉所表现的证候。多因感受寒邪而发病。
en: This is a syndrome due to retention of pathogenic cold in the liver channel. resulting chiefly from invasion of the liver by pathogenic cold.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.85；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=328-328；zh_pdf_pages=554-554；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 胆郁痰扰证是胆失疏泄，痰热内扰所表现的证候。
en: This is a morbid condition of attack by phlegm and heat due to dysfunction of the gallbladder in dispersion.

entities.en: syndrome of attack by phlegm due to stagnation of the gallbladder-Qi

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.86；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=328-329；zh_pdf_pages=554-554；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多由于情志不遂，气机不畅，疏泄失职，气郁生痰化热而致。
en: It results mainly from emotional upsets, depression of Qi, failure of the gallbladder to perform its dispersing function, and then production of phlegm and pathogenic heat due to stagnation of Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.86；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=328-329；zh_pdf_pages=554-554；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为惊悸不寐，烦躁不宁，胸闷胁胀，口苦呕恶，头晕目眩，舌苔黄腻，脉弦滑。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: palpitation, insomnia, restlessness, stuffiness in the chest and distention of the hypochondrium, bitter taste, nausea, dizziness, yellow and greasy fur on the tongue, and taut slippery pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.86；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=328-329；zh_pdf_pages=554-554；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多因年高肾亏，或久病伤肾，或房室过度等引起。
en: It results mainly from kidney-deficiency in the aged, injury of the kidneys due to chronic disorders and intemperance in sexual life.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.87；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=329-329；zh_pdf_pages=554-554；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多因先天禀赋不足，或后天调养失宜，或房事过度，或久病伤肾而致。
en: It is caused mainly by congenital defects, improper care after birth, or intemperance in sexual life and injury of the kidneys due to chronic disorders.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.90；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=330-330；zh_pdf_pages=555-555；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为小儿发育迟缓，身材矮小，智力低下，动作迟钝，囟门闭迟，骨骼痿软。成人或为男子精少不育，女子经闭不孕，或早衰，发脱齿摇，耳鸣耳聋，健忘恍惚，足痿无力，精神呆钝，动作迟缓。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: in infants, retarded development, marked by microsoma low intelligence, bradypragia, tardy closure of fontanel, and dysostosis; in adults, sterility due to spermacrasia in males and due to amenorrhea in females, premature senility, baldness and odonteseisis, tinnitus, deafness, amnesia, trance, flaccidity of feet, hyponea and bradypragia.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.90；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=330-330；zh_pdf_pages=555-555；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 膀胱湿热证是湿热蕴结膀胱所表现的证候。
en: This is a morbid condition due to retention of pathogenic damp-heat in the urinary bladder.

entities.en: syndrome of damp-heat in the urinary bladder

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.91；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=331-331；zh_pdf_pages=555-555；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多由外感湿热之邪，蕴结膀胱，或饮食不节，湿热内生，下注膀胱而致。
en: It usually results from the accumulation of exogenous damp-heat pathogen in the urinary bladder or downward flow to the urinary bladder of the damp-heat pathogen deriving from immoderate diet.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.91；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=331-331；zh_pdf_pages=555-555；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为尿频、尿急、尿涩少而痛，尿黄赤混浊，或尿血，或尿有砂石，可伴有发热、腰痛。舌红，苔黄腻，脉滑数。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: Frequent and urgent micturition, scanty urine and dysuria, brownish red cloudy urine or hematuria, urinary calculus, often accompanied with fever and lumbago, red tongue with yellowish and greasy fur, and slippery rapid pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.91；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=331-331；zh_pdf_pages=555-555；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为心烦不寐，心悸不安，头晕耳鸣，健忘，腰膝酸软，遗精，五心烦热，咽干口燥，舌红，脉细数。
en: Its clinical manifetetions are: Vexation, insomnia, palpitation, dizziness, tinnitus amnesia, soreness of the waist and knees, seminal emission, dysphoria with feverish sensation in the chest, palms and soles, dry throat and mouth, red tongue, thready and rapid pulse; sometimes accompenied with lassitude and feeling of cold in the loins and knees.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.92；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=331-331；zh_pdf_pages=555-555；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为畏寒肢冷，心悸怔忡，小便不利，颜面肢体浮肿，下肢肿甚。舌淡暗或青紫，苔白滑，脉沉微细。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: aversion to cold, cold limbs, palpitation, dysuria, edema in the face and especially in the lower limbs, cyanotic lips and nails, pale, dark and cyanotic tongue with whitish and glossy fur, and deep thready and feeble pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.93；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=332-332；zh_pdf_pages=555-556；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 心肺气虚证是心肺两脏气虚所表现的证候。
en: This is a morbid condition due to insufficiency of the heart-Qi and the lung-Qi.

entities.en: syndrome of deficiency of Qi in the heart and the lungs

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.94；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=332-332；zh_pdf_pages=556-556；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 由于久病咳喘，耗伤心肺之气，或劳倦过度而致。
en: It is usually brought about by overstrain or consumption of Qi in the heart and the lungs due to chronic cough with dyspnea.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.94；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=332-332；zh_pdf_pages=556-556；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为心悸气短，咳喘少气，心胸憋闷，乏力自汗，动则尤甚。面色觥白，或暗滞，甚则口唇青紫。
en: Its clinical menifestations are: palpitation, shortness of breath, cough with dyspnea. thoracic stuffiness, weakness with spontaneous sweating especially on exertion, pallor or dark complexion, or even cyanotic lips, pale tongue with whitish fur and thready weak pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.94；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=332-332；zh_pdf_pages=556-556；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为喘促短气，呼多吸少，气不得续，动则益甚。
en: It usuaily results from consumption of the lung-Qi and injury of the kidney-Qi by cough with dyspnea due to protracted illness.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.95；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=332-333；zh_pdf_pages=556-556；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 自汗神疲，声低气怯，腰膝酸软，舌淡，苔白，脉沉弱，或表现为喘息加剧，肢冷面青，冷汗淋漓，脉浮大无根。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: dyspnea, shortness of breath with prolonged exhalation and shortened inhalation, difficulty in breathing more obvious on exertion, spontaneous sweating, lassitude, leptophonia and shortness of breath. weakness of the loins and knees, pale tongue with whitish coating, deep and weak pulse, or severe dyspnea. cold limbs, cyanotic complexion, severe clammy sweat, and floating, large, unrooted pulse (easily felt on light pressure but disappearing on heavy pressure).
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.95；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=332-333；zh_pdf_pages=556-556；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为面色觥白，畏寒肢冷，腰膝或下腹冷痛，久泻久痢，或五更泄泻，或下利清谷，或小便不利，面浮肢肿，甚则腹胀如鼓。舌淡胖，苔白滑，脉沉弱。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: pallor, aversion to cold, cold limbs, feeling of cold-pain in the waist, knees and lower abdomen, chronic diarrhea and dysentery, diarrhea before dawn or diarrhea with indigested food in the stool, dysuria, puffy face and edema of the limbs, severe abdominal distention resembling shape of a drum, pale and swollen longue with whitish and glossy fur, and deep weak pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.98；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=334-334；zh_pdf_pages=557-557；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 由于久病咳喘，肺虚及脾，或饮食失调，劳倦伤脾，不能输精于肺而致。
en: It usually results from deficiency of the jungs due to chronic cough with dyspnes which, in turn, affects the spleen, or from injury of the spleen due to improper diet and overstrain leading to its failure to transport essence to the lungs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.99；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=335-335；zh_pdf_pages=557-557；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为久咳不止，气喘而喘，痰多稀白，食欲不振，腹胀便溏，疲倦乏力，少气懒言，面色光白，甚则面浮肢肿。舌淡苔白，脉细弱。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: protracted cough, shortness of breath with dyspnea, expectoration of profuse clear sputum, poor appetite, abdominal distention, loose stool, lassitude, debility with disinclination to talk, pallor, or even puffiness of face and feet, pale tongue with whitish fur, and thready weak pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.99；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=335-335；zh_pdf_pages=557-557；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多由于情志不遂，郁怒伤肝，肝失疏泄，影响脾的运化功能，或因饮食劳倦伤脾，脾虚湿蕴，影响肝之疏泄，而致肝脾不调。
en: It results mostly rom impairment of the liver by emotional upsets and enduring anger leading to dysfunction of the liver which, in turn, affects the spleen's transporting function, or from impairment of the spleen by improper diet and overstrain leading to its deficiency which, in turn, gives rise to stagnation of pathogenic dampness in the body with the liver's function affected.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.100；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=335-335；zh_pdf_pages=557-557；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为胸胁胀满窜痛，善太息，情志抑郁，或急躁急怒，纳呆腹胀，便溏不爽，肠鸣矢气，或腹痛欲泻，泻后痛减。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: distending and wandering pain in the chest and hypochondrium, sighing, emotional stress, irritability, poor appetite, abdominal distention, loose stool, borborygmus, flatulence, inclination to diarrhea due to abdominal pain ralieved after diarrhea whitish fur on the tongue, and taut pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.100；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=335-335；zh_pdf_pages=557-557；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 多由于情志不舒，肝气郁结，横逆犯胃而致。
en: It usually results from emotional depression and the stagnation of hyperactive liver-Qi attacking the stomach transversely.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.101；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=336-336；zh_pdf_pages=557-557；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为胸闷胁胀，胁肋、胃脘胀满疼痛，呃逆嗳气，吞酸嘈杂，或烦躁易怒，舌苔薄，或白或黄，脉弦。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: chest stuffiness, distention and pain in the hypochondriac region and the epigastrium, hiccup, eructation, gastric discomfort with acid regurgitation, anxiety and irritability, whitish, yellowish and thin fur on the tongue, and taut pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.101；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=336-336；zh_pdf_pages=557-557；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 久病失调，思虑劳倦、慢性出血，都可导致心脾两虚证。
en: It results mainly from improper care after protracted illness, worries, fatigue, and chronic hemorrhage.

entities.en: syndrome of deficiency of Qi and blood in the heart and the spleen

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.102；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=336-336；zh_pdf_pages=558-558；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为心悸怔忡，失眠多梦，眩晕健忘，面色萎黄，食欲不振，腹胀便溏，神倦乏力，或皮下出血，妇女月经量少色淡，淋漓不尽。舌质淡嫩，脉细弱。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: Palpitation, insomnia, dreaminess, dizziness, amnesia, sallow complexion, poor appetite, abdominal distention, loose stool, lassitude and weakness, subcutaneous hemorrhage, scanty light coloured menstruation of a prolonged period, pale and tender tongue, and thready weak pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.102；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=336-336；zh_pdf_pages=558-558；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为胸胁灼痛，急躁易怒，头晕目赤，烦热口苦，咳嗽阵作，甚则咳血。舌红，苔薄黄，脉弦数。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: burning pain in the chest and hypochondrium, irritability, dizziness, conjunctival congestion, dysphoria with smothery sensation, bitter taste, paroxysmal cough or even hemoptysis, red tongue with yellow and thin fur and taut rapid pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.103；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=336-337；zh_pdf_pages=558-558；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 经辨证是应用于外感病的一种辨证方法。是东汉时期的医学家张仲景在《伤寒论》中提出的。
en: This is one of the methods of differential diagnosis for exopathic diseases, put forward in the book Shang Han Lunby Zhang Zhongjing, a distinguished physician in the Easten Han Dynasty.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.104；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=337-338；zh_pdf_pages=558-558；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 外邪侵袭，卫气趋表抗邪，正邪交争，则发热；卫气趋表抗邪，不能发挥正常的温煦作用，则恶寒；卫气趋表抗邪，脉气鼓动于外，故脉浮。
en: When exogenous pathogens invade the body, the defensive Qi goes to the superficies to resist them and a conflict between the vital Qi (defensive Qi) and the pathogens ensues, thereby leading to fever. Since the defensive Qi has consumed on the superficies, it fails to warm the body and the symptom of aversion to cold appears as a result. As the defensive-Qi stimulates the pulse to the exterior it feels floeting.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.105；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=3-5；en_pdf_pages=338-338；zh_pdf_pages=558-559；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 由于患者腠理疏松，感邪后致使腠理开泄，故自汗出，脉浮缓。
en: Since the striae of the skin are loose, the pores will open during attack of the skin and muscles by pathogenic wind, thereby resulting in such symptoms as spontaneous sweating, floating and slow pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.106；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=339-339；zh_pdf_pages=559-559；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 腠理闭塞因而无汗。表闭无汗，使经气不畅，故身痛。
en: Failure of the striae to open causes anhidrosis, which, in turn, results in obstruction of flow of the channel-Qi, and general aching occurs as a result.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.107；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=339-340；zh_pdf_pages=559-559；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 表闭使肺气不宜，肺气上逆，故喘。
en: And it is also the closure of striae of the skin that causes block and abnormal rising of lung-Qi, thereby leading to dyspnea.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.107；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=339-340；zh_pdf_pages=559-559；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 外邪束表，皮肤敛束，故脉浮紧。
en: The skin contracts while it is being attacked by the exopathogens, hence the pulse feels floating and tense.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.107；zh_sentence_span=6；en_sentence_span=5；en_pdf_pages=339-340；zh_pdf_pages=559-559；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 由于此证腠理闭塞、无汗，因而又称为表实证。
en: Therefore, a syndrome characterized by closure of the striae of the skin and anhidrosis is also known as an exterior excess syndrome.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.107；zh_sentence_span=7；en_sentence_span=6；en_pdf_pages=339-340；zh_pdf_pages=559-559；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为身大热，大汗出，大渴引饮，脉洪大。心烦面赤，舌苔黄燥。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: high fever, profuse sweating, extreme thirst, full and large pulse, dysphoria, flushed face, yellow and dry fur on the tongue.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.109；zh_sentence_span=2-3；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=340-341；zh_pdf_pages=559-560；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 邪热炽盛，充斥内外，弥漫全身，故身大热；里热蒸迫津液外泄则大汗出；热盛伤津，汗出伤津则大渴引饮；里热炽盛，鼓动气血则脉洪大。
en: Spread of pathogenic heat all over the body brings about high fever, evaporation of internal heat forces body fluid to flow outward. thereby inducing profuse sweating, and overabundance of heat and profuse sweating, both of which consume body fluid, result in extreme thirst. When the excessive heat prompts the flow of Qi and blood in the body, the pulse will become full and large. Heat dislurbing mental activities causes dysphoria.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.109；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=3-5；en_pdf_pages=340-341；zh_pdf_pages=559-560；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 热扰神明则心烦，热甚伤津则舌苔黄燥。
en: And finally, excessive heat steamingand consuming body fluid leads to yellow and dry fur on the tongue.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.109；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=6；en_pdf_pages=340-341；zh_pdf_pages=559-560；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为日晡潮热，手足或全身溅然汗出，腹满疼痛拒按，大便秘结，或泻下清水恶臭，烦躁，谵语。舌苔黄厚干燥，甚则焦黑燥裂起刺，脉沉迟有力。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: afteroon fever, panhidrosis or polyhidrosis of handsand feel, abdominal distension with pain and tenderness, constipation of solid fecal material in the large intestinal tract or watery stool with a foul smell, restlessness, delirium, yellow, thick and dry fur on the. tongue, or even burnt black, fissured and prickly tongue, deep, slow and forceful pulse. Since the Qi of Yangming channel becomes most vigorous at the time Shen (or the period of a day from 3-5 p.m.), the internal pathogenic heat spreads quickly to the superficies, causing afternoon fever.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.110；zh_sentence_span=2-3；en_sentence_span=2-3；en_pdf_pages=341-342；zh_pdf_pages=560-560；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为口苦，咽于，目眩，胸胁苦满，往来寒热，默默不欲饮食，心烦喜呕，苔白或薄黄，脉弦。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: bitter taste in the mouth, dry throat, dizziness, sensation of pain and fullness in the chest and hypochondrium, alternate attacks of chills and fever, taciturnity, poor appetite, vexation, vomiting, whitish or thin and yellowish fur on the tongue, and taut pusle.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.111；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=342-342；zh_pdf_pages=560-560；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 气机不畅，影响胃腑，则不欲饮食。
en: When mental activities are affected by stagnation of fire, vexation ensues.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.111；zh_sentence_span=7；en_sentence_span=8；en_pdf_pages=342-342；zh_pdf_pages=560-560；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为口渴不止，气往上冲，心中发热而痛，虽饥而不欲食，手足清冷，下利，呕吐，甚则吐出蛔虫。或厥热交替出现。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: persistent thirst, upward reflux of gas (Qi), chest pain with hot sensation, hunger with no desire for eating, cold limbs, diarrhea, vomiting or even vomiting of ascaris, and alternate spells of chills and fever.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.116；zh_sentence_span=4-5；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=345-345；zh_pdf_pages=561-562；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 表现为口渴不止，气往上冲，心中发热而痛。
en: If the fire is scorchingly fanned up by the pathogenic wind, the heat syndrome will show upward, causing persistent thirst and vomiting, and chest pain with hot sensation.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.116；zh_sentence_span=8；en_sentence_span=7；en_pdf_pages=345-345；zh_pdf_pages=561-562；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如果肠道有蛔虫，那么蛔虫避寒就温，趋向膈上，则吐出姻虫。
en: If there are ascaris in the intestinal tract, they will rise to the diaphragm, preferring warmth to cold, and will subsequently be vomited out.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.116；zh_sentence_span=11；en_sentence_span=9；en_pdf_pages=345-345；zh_pdf_pages=561-562；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 卫气营血辨证是应用于外感温热病的一种辨证方法，是清代医学家叶天士创立的。
en: Qi, Ying and Xue This is a diagnostic methed for epidemic febrile diseases by exopathogens, developed by Ye Tianshi, an eminent physician of the Qing Dynasty.

entities.en: differential diagnosis by the analysis of Wei, Qi, Ying and Xue

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.117；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=346-346；zh_pdf_pages=562-562；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 卫气营血辨证是在《伤寒论》六经辨证的基础上创立的，并且弥补了六经辨证的不足，从而发展和丰富了中医学辨治外感病的理论。
en: This theory was founded on the basis of differential diagnosis in accordance with the theory of six channels dealt with in the book Treatise on Febrile Diseases, and served as a supplement to that theory, thereby developing and enriching the theory for differential diagnosis and treatment of exopathic diseases in TCM.

entities.en: differential diagnosis by the analysis of Wei, Qi, Ying and Xue
differential diagnosis in accordance with the theory of Six Channels

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.117；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=346-346；zh_pdf_pages=562-562；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 卫气营血辨证，将温热病过程中错综复杂的临床表现概括归纳为卫分证、气分证、营分证、血分证四类证候。这四类证候代表着温热病发展过程中浅深轻重不同的四个阶段。
en: The differential diagnosis by the analysis of Wei. Qi, Ying and Xue classifies all intricate clinical manifestations in the course of epidemic febrile diseases into four categories: Weifen, Qifm, Yingfen and Xuefen syndromes, which denote the four different stages (superficial or deep and mild or serious) in the development of an epidemic febrile disease.

entities.en: differential diagnosis by the analysis of Wei, Qi, Ying and Xue

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.117；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=3-4；en_pdf_pages=346-346；zh_pdf_pages=562-562；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 卫气营血辨证是对外感温热病发展变化规律的认识。
en: It is also thought of a law governing the development and changes of epidemic febrile diseases due to exopathogens.

entities.en: differential diagnosis by the analysis of Wei, Qi, Ying and Xue

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.117；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=5；en_pdf_pages=346-346；zh_pdf_pages=562-562；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 邪热初伤津液，则口干微渴。邪犯肌表，肺失宣降则咳嗽。
en: Initial consumption of body fluid by the pathogenic heat brings about dry mouth and slight thirst, and invasion of the skin by the pathogenic heat, whereby the lungs fail to perform their dispersing and descending function, Tesults in cough.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.118；zh_sentence_span=6-7；en_sentence_span=5；en_pdf_pages=346-347；zh_pdf_pages=562-562；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 咽喉为肺之门户，温热之邪上灼则咽喉肿痛。
en: When the throat, as an outlet of the lungs, is scorched by the warm-heat pathogen, it will become swollen and painful.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.118；zh_sentence_span=8；en_sentence_span=6；en_pdf_pages=346-347；zh_pdf_pages=562-562；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为发热，不恶寒反恶热，舌红苔黄，脉数。常伴有心烦、口渴、小便短赤等。
en: Its clin. ical manifestations are: fever, aversion to heat rather than cold, red tongue with yellowish fur, rapid pulse; often accompanied by vexation, thirst, scanty dark urine, etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.119；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=347-348；zh_pdf_pages=562-563；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如果热壅于肺，还见咳嗽，气喘，胸痛，咯痰黄稠，热扰胸膈者，还见心烦懊恼，坐卧不安，热炽于胃者，表现为壮热不已，大汗出，烦渴引饮，脉洪大；热结肠道者，表现为大便秘结，腹满硬痛，或下利清水，舌苔黄厚而干燥，脉沉实有力。
en: In case of stagnation of the pathogenic heat in the lungs such symptoms occur as cough, dyspnea, chest pain and cough with yellowish thick sputum; In case of affection of the chest and diaphragm by the pathogenic heat, there may appear such symptoms as vexation, heartburn and restlessness, In case of invasion of the stomach by the pathogenic heat, there may occur such symptoms as high fever. profuse sweating, extreme thirst, and large full pulse. In case of accumulation of pathogenic heat in the intestinal tract such symptoms as constipation or constipation of solid fecal material with watery. discharge, fullness, pain and hard sensation in the abdomen, yellow, thick and dry fur on the tongue, and deep. replete and forceful pulse are likely to occur.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.119；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=3-4；en_pdf_pages=347-348；zh_pdf_pages=562-563；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 总之，温热之邪由表入里而未入营动血的一切病证，皆属气分证的范围。
en: To sum up, all symptoms and signs resulting from attack of the interior from the superficies by the pathogenic heat with Yingfen and Xuef en unaffected belong to the category of Qifen syndrome.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.119；zh_sentence_span=6；en_sentence_span=5；en_pdf_pages=347-348；zh_pdf_pages=562-563；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 血分证是温热病邪深入血分的危重证候。
en: This is a critical syndrome indicating invasion of Xuefen by the warm-heat pathogen, which is regarded as the last and most serious stage of an epidemic febrile disease, clinically characterized by invasion of blood by excessive heat and disorder of mental activities.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.121；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=348-349；zh_pdf_pages=563-563；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 血分证是温病发展的最后阶段，病情最为深重。
en: Clinical manifestations indicate fever, restlessness, coma, delirium, purple or dark skin eruptions, hemoptysis. epistaxis, hematochezia, convulsion and syncope. reddened or crimson tongue, thready and rapid pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.121；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=348-349；zh_pdf_pages=563-563；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床特点是热盛动血，心神扰乱。
en: Fever is the result of invasion of Xuef en by the pathogenic heat.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.121；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=348-349；zh_pdf_pages=563-563；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为身热，躁扰不安，神昏谵语，斑疹透露，色紫或黑，或吐血，衄血，便血，或抽搐惊厥。舌质深绛，脉细数。
en: In case of mental disorder due to heat, such symptoms as restlessness, coma and delirium are likely to occur.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.121；zh_sentence_span=4-5；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=348-349；zh_pdf_pages=563-563；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 舌质深绛，脉细数，为血分受邪热熏灼的表现。
en: Finally, reddened or crimson tongue, and small rapid pulse are characteristic of the morbid condition in which Xuefen is fumed and scorched by the pathogenic heat.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.121；zh_sentence_span=7；en_sentence_span=6；en_pdf_pages=348-349；zh_pdf_pages=563-563；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 焦辨证是温热病的辨证方法之一。它是清代医学家吴塘创立的。
en: This is a method of differential diagnosis for epidemic febrile diseases, invented by Wu Tang, a distinguished physician of the Qing dynasty.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.122；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=349-349；zh_pdf_pages=563-564；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 温热病是感受四时不同温热病邪所引起的急性热病的总称由于四时气候变化不同，感受病邪有异，患者的素质及人体反应性也不同，因而发生的温病各具特点，类型很多。
en: Epidemic febrile disease is a general term for all acute febrile diseases caused by different warm-heat pathogens in the four seasens. With seasonal climates, types of exopathogens and the patient's constitution and bodily response.epidemic febrile diseases vary widely in their form, each having its own distinguishing characteristics.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.122；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=2-3；en_pdf_pages=349-349；zh_pdf_pages=563-564；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 焦辨证是对温病由上至下发展变化规律的认识，是对卫气营血辨证的补充。
en: In brief, differential diagnosis in light of the doctrine of tri-Jiao is a theory about the development of epidemic febrile diseases from the upper part to the lower part of the body, and a further supplement to the differential diagnosis by the analysis of Wei, Qi, Ying and Xue as well.

entities.en: differential diagnosis by the analysis of Wei, Qi, Ying and Xue

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.122；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=349-349；zh_pdf_pages=563-564；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 上焦湿热证是湿热之邪侵袭人体的初期所表现的证候。
en: This is an exterior syndrome due to invasion of the body by the damp-heat pathogen at the early stage of an epidemic febrile disease.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.123；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=349-350；zh_pdf_pages=564-564；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为恶寒重，发热轻微，或不发热，或午后发热，头重如裹，肢体困重，无汗，胸闷脘痞，纳呆，口粘不渴，神情呆滞，肠鸣便溏。舌苔白腻，脉濡缓。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: severe aversion to cold, slight or no fever or afternoon fever, heavy sensation even the head as if tightly bound, heavy sensation in the limbs, lassitude, anhidrosis, chest distension and stuffiness in the epigastrium, poor appetite, sticky taste in the mouth with no feeling of thirst, hyponea, borborygmus, loose stool, whitish and greasy fur on the tongue, and soft, slow pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.123；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=349-350；zh_pdf_pages=564-564；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 中焦湿热证是湿热致病的中期所表现的证候。其病机主要是湿热困阻脾胃。
en: This is a syndrome due to invasion of the body by damp-heat pathogen at the middle stage of an epidemic febrile disease, the main pathogenesis of which lies in the retention of the damp-heat pathogen in the spleen and stomach.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.124；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=350-350；zh_pdf_pages=564-564；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 临床表现为身热不扬，或汗出热不退，或午后热甚，肢体困重，胸闷腹胀，呕恶，不饥不食，口渴不欲多饮，面色萎黄，或面目淡黄，神呆少言，甚或神昏。小便短赤，大便塘泄不爽。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: moderate fever which is higher in the afternoon and does not subside after sweating, heavy sensation in the limbs, lassitude, chest stuffiness and abdominal distention, nausea, poor appetite. thirst with little desire for drink, sallow or yellowish complexion, hyponea, hypologia or coma, scanty dark urine, loose stool, sudaminal crystallina, greyish and yellowish fur on the tongue and soft rapid pulse.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.124；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=350-350；zh_pdf_pages=564-564；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 下焦湿热证是湿热之邪由中焦传入下焦，阻滞膀胱与大肠表现出的证候。
en: This is a syndrome due to stagnation of the damp-heat pathogens extending from the middle-Jiao to the lower-Jiao in the urinary bladder and the large intestine, leading to dysfunction of the former in micturition and functional disturbance of the latter.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.125；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=351-352；zh_pdf_pages=564-565；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 湿热阻滞膀胱与大肠，使膀胱气化失职，大肠腑气不通，临床表现为小便不利，或短赤，渴不多饮，或大便不通，小腹硬满，或大便溏泻不爽，头胀昏沉。舌苔灰白黄腻，脉濡数。
en: Its clinical manifestations are: dysuria or scanty dark urine, thirst with desire for little drink, constipation, feeling of hardness and fullness in the lower abdomen, or loose stool with tenesmus. sensation of distension over the head.dizziness, greyish, yellowish and greasy fur on the tongue, and soft, rapid pulse. Principles
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=9.125；zh_sentence_span=2-3；en_sentence_span=2-3；en_pdf_pages=351-352；zh_pdf_pages=564-565；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 即预防和治疗疾病必须遵循的原则。
en: It refers to principles that must be followed in the prevention and treatment of disease.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.1；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=352-352；zh_pdf_pages=565-565；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 所谓治未病，包括未病先防和既病防变两方面的内容，此即中医学预防疾病发生发展的原则。
en: "Preventive treatment of disease"involves prevention of a disease before it actually occurs and control of an existing disease. That is the principle of preventing the occurrence and development of disease in TCM.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.1；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=4-5；en_pdf_pages=352-352；zh_pdf_pages=565-565；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 调摄精神，使精神内守；加强锻炼，以增强体质，以及生活起居有规律、药物预防、人工免疫，均能提高正气的抗邪能力。
en: Therefore, recuperating one's vigour to keep a sound mind, taking exercise to build up one's health.leading a regular and temperate life, preventing disease with medicines, and artificial immunity can all increase body resistance.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.2；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=352-353；zh_pdf_pages=565-565；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 讲究卫生，防止环境、水源和食物污染，皆可避免病邪的侵害。
en: In addition, developing hygienic habits, preventing pollution of the environment, water supply and food can also guard against invasion of pathogens.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.2；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=352-353；zh_pdf_pages=565-565；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 即在疾病发生后，应早诊断，早治疗，将疾病治愈于萌芽阶段，以防止疾病的发展和传变。
en: Once it occurs, a disease should be early diagnosed and treated and be cured in its initial stage, so as to stop it from developing into a more serious state.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.3；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=353-353；zh_pdf_pages=565-565；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如肝属木、脾属土，木旺乘土；肝病则能传及脾，故临床上治疗肝病，常配合健脾和胃之法，使脾胃强壮而不受肝之邪气侵扰，就是既病防变原则的具体应用。
en: That is to say, hyperfunction of the liver (wood) may affect the functioning of the spleen (earth). Therefore, disorder of the liver is often clinically treated in combination with treatment for strengthening the spleen and stomach in. order to make them strong enough to resist liver-pathogens. That is a practical application of the principle regarding control of the development of an existing disease.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.3；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=4-6；en_pdf_pages=353-353；zh_pdf_pages=565-565；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 简称治则，是治疗疾病必须遵循的法则。
en: They are laws which must be followed in the treatment of disease.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.4；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=353-354；zh_pdf_pages=566-566；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 简称治法，是指具体的治疗方法，如汗、吐、下、和、温、清、补、消等。
en: They comprise certain concrete medical treatment, namely, diaphoresis, emisis, purgation, regulation, warming, heat-clearing, invigoration, resolution, etc.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.5；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=354-354；zh_pdf_pages=566-566；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 治法与治则不同，治则是用以指导治疗方法的总则，而治疗方法是治则的具体化。
en: The therapeutic method is different from the therapeutic principle in that the latter is the general principle guiding the therapeutic method, while the former is the practical application of the therapeutic principle.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.5；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=354-354；zh_pdf_pages=566-566；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 即在治病时，要找出疾病的根本原因，抓住疾病的本质，并针对疾病的根本原因进行治疗。
en: In handling a disease a doctor must search for its primary cause, in accordance with which he or she may adopt a proper treatment.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.6；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=354-355；zh_pdf_pages=566-566；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 因此，治病时要善于辨析疾病的病因，探究疾病的病机，并针对病因病机进行治疗。
en: Thorefore, in treating a disease a doctor must be adept at finding out the cause of a disease, and analysing its pathogenesis, thereby instituting a treatment accordingly. Take headache as an example.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.6；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=3-4；en_pdf_pages=354-355；zh_pdf_pages=566-566；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 外感头痛，病因属于风寒的，治宜辛温解表；属于风温的，治宜辛凉解表。
en: Headache due to exopathy is of wind-cold type in etiology and, therefore, treatment by relieving the exterior syndrome with drugs pungent in flavor and warm in nature is advisable, while headache due to exopathy of wind-warm type should be treated by relieving the exterior syndrome with drugs pungent in flavor and cool in nature.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.6；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=6；en_pdf_pages=354-355；zh_pdf_pages=566-566；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 这就是治病求本的意义所在。
en: This is what is meant by treatment aiming at the primary cause of disease.

entities.en: treatment aiming at the primary cause of disease

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.6；zh_sentence_span=7；en_sentence_span=8；en_pdf_pages=354-355；zh_pdf_pages=566-566；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 又称逆治法，是逆其疾病征象而治的一种常用治疗法则，逆，是指采用方药的性质与疾病的外在征象相反。
en: It is a commonly used therapeutic principle of treating a disease with the method and drugs contrary to its nature, or manifestations. Here, it refers to a method of treating a disease with recipes and drugs opposite to its extrinsic phenomena.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.7；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1-2；en_pdf_pages=355-356；zh_pdf_pages=566-567；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 正治法适用于疾病的现象与本质相一致的病证，逆其现象实际上就是针对疾病的本质进行治疗。
en: It is suitable to those cases in which manifestations of a disease accord with its nature. Therefore, treatment contrary to symptoms and signs of a disease is in fact one in accordance with its nature.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.7；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=3-4；en_pdf_pages=355-356；zh_pdf_pages=566-567；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 由于大多数疾病的现象与本质是相一致的，因而正治法是临床上最常用的一种治疗原则。
en: Since the manifestations of most diseases coincide with their nature, routine treatment has been a therapeutic principle most commonly used clinically.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.7；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=5；en_pdf_pages=355-356；zh_pdf_pages=566-567；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 寒者热之、热者寒之、虚者补之、实者泻之等，皆属正治法。
en: Consequently, treatment of cold syndromes with medicines of hot nature, that of heat syndromes with medicines of cold nature, that of deficiency syndromes by reinforcement, and that of excess syndromes by purgation, all are examples of routine treatment.

entities.en: treatment of cold-syndrome with hot-natured drugs
treatment of heat-syndrome with cold-natured drugs

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.7；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=6；en_pdf_pages=355-356；zh_pdf_pages=566-567；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 适用于寒病见寒象的实寒证。
en: It refers to a therapy of cold-syndrome with drugs of hot nature, which is suitable to interior cold syndrome of excess type of a cold disease manifested by cold signs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.8；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=356-356；zh_pdf_pages=567-567；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 适用于热病见热象的实热证。
en: It is a therapeutic method for treating heat-syndrome, with drugs of cold nature, which is suitable to excess-heat type of a febrile-disease manifested by heat signs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.9；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=356-356；zh_pdf_pages=567-567；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如火热之邪伤人，出现高热、恶热、烦渴、汗出、脉洪大等症，则应以苦寒之药清热泻火。
en: For example, such syndromes as high fever, aversion to heat, excessive thirst, profuse sweating and full and large pulse etc. caused by an attack of pathogenic heat (fire) on the human body should be treated by clearing the pathogenic.heat and purging pathogenic fire with drugs bitter in taste and cold in nature.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.9；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=356-356；zh_pdf_pages=567-567；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 适用于虚病见虚象的虚证。
