en: It is a therapy for various types of asthenia-syndromes, applicable to a deficiency case manifested by asthenia-signs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.10；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=356-357；zh_pdf_pages=567-567；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 适用于实病见实象的实证。
en: It is a therapeutic method for treating excess syndromes, applicable to an excess case manifested by excess signs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.11；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=357-357；zh_pdf_pages=567-567；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如肠胃热结，出现身热、腹满硬痛、大便不通等症，当用泻下法驱除肠胃积滞。
en: For instance, retention of pathogenic heat in the stomach and intestines marked by such symptoms as fever, fullness and pain in the abdomen, constipation etc., should be treated by purgation to remove the retained indigested food in the gastrointestinal tract.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.11；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=357-357；zh_pdf_pages=567-567；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 从，是指采用方药的性质顺从疾病的假象，与假象相一致。
en: The false appearances of a disease are phenomena that distort or reverse its nature and are unable to represent its essence.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.12；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=357-358；zh_pdf_pages=567-568；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 假象，是本质被歪曲了的、颠倒了的现象，不能反映疾病的本质，故治病时，必须透过假象，抓住本质。
en: Therefore, in treating a disease we must see through its appearances to get at its essence. Treatment contrary to the routine appears to conform with the false signs of a disease, but actually it is contrary to its essence.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.12；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=4-5；en_pdf_pages=357-358；zh_pdf_pages=567-568；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 反治法表面上看是顺从疾病的假象，而实际上正是针对疾病的本质进行治疗。
en: As a consequence, treatment contrary to the routine as well as routine treatment are both practical application of the therapeutic principle of treating a disease by aiming at its primary cuses.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.12；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=6；en_pdf_pages=357-358；zh_pdf_pages=567-568；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 因而反治法与正治法一样，都是治病求本原则的具体运用，热因热用、寒因寒用、塞因塞用、通因通用等，皆属反治法。
en: Treatment of pseudo-heat syndrome with drugs of hot nature, that of pseudo-cold syndrome with drugs of cold nature, that of the obstructive disease with tonics, that of discharging disease with purgatives, etc, all these treatments are examples of this therapeutic principle.

entities.en: treatment aiming at the primary cause of disease

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.12；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=7；en_pdf_pages=357-358；zh_pdf_pages=567-568；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 由于热盛是其本质，故须用寒凉药治其真热，而假象方能消失。
en: Since excess of heat is the essence of the disease, the heat-syndrome must be treated with drugs of cold-cool nature, and subsequently the false manifestations or pseudo-cold symptoms will disappear by itself.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.14；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=358-359；zh_pdf_pages=568-568；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 这称为“寒因寒用”。
en: This is what is meant by treatment of psseudo-cold syndrome with drugs of cold nature.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.14；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=5；en_pdf_pages=358-359；zh_pdf_pages=568-568；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 适用于因虚而闭阻的真虚假实证。
en: It is applicable to treatment of such deficiency-syndrome in reality with pseudo-excess symptoms as obstruction syndrome due to deficiency.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.15；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=359-359；zh_pdf_pages=568-568；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如脾虚病人，常出现脘腹胀满，时胀时减，纳呆，舌质淡，脉虚无力等症，且无食积、痰湿留滞等征象可循，故当以健脾益气治之。
en: For example, the patient with insufficiency of the spleen, who usually presents wit! remittent abdominal and epigastric distention, anorexia, pale tongue and feeble and weak pulse, etc, but develops no such symptoms as dyspepsia, stagnation of phlegm-dampness should be treated with drugs for strengthening the spleen and replenishing Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.15；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=359-359；zh_pdf_pages=568-568；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 脾气健运，则腹胀自消。
en: When the spleen-Qi functions properly in transport. the abdominal distention will subside by itself.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.15；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=359-359；zh_pdf_pages=568-568；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 即以通治通，是指用通利的药物治疗具有通泄症状的实性病证，包括真实假虚证。
en: It is a method of treating excess-syndrome with discharging symptoms including excess-syndrome in reality with pseudo-deficiency symptoms, with purgative drugs.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.16；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=359-360；zh_pdf_pages=568-569；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 寒邪入血，则血寒而凝；邪热入血，煎熬血液，则血液粘滞。
en: Invasion of blood by cold pathogens leads to coagulation due to blood-cold; invasion of blood by heat pathogens leads to sticky stagnation.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.33；zh_sentence_span=4-5；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=186-187；zh_pdf_pages=477-477；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。；补充修正：从原教材句对中按语义片段重新抽取/修正，避开严重中英长度比例异常，并复核英文OCR与术语格式。；替换原样本 TCM_TRAIN_0960；替换原因：no_entity_after_auto_extraction；候选来源=train_final_1000_cleaned.xlsx；候选id=TCM_TRAIN_0468。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 脉象从容和缓，节律一致，是为有胃气。
en: The soft, even and forceful pulse indicates the vitality of stomach-Qi.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=8.111；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=275-276；zh_pdf_pages=522-523；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。；补充修正：从原教材句对中按语义片段重新抽取/修正，避开严重中英长度比例异常，并复核英文OCR与术语格式。；替换原样本 TCM_TRAIN_0961；替换原因：no_entity_after_auto_extraction；候选来源=train_final_1000_cleaned.xlsx；候选id=TCM_TRAIN_0670。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如从邪正双方来说，正气是本，邪气为标。
en: In other words, any disease has its primary and secondary cause. So far as, pathogens and vitalQi are concerned, the latter is primary while the former secondary.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.17；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2-3；en_pdf_pages=360-361；zh_pdf_pages=569-569；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 从疾病先后来说，旧病、原发病为本，新病、继发病为标。在复杂多变的病证中，常有标本主次的不同，因而在治疗上就有先后缓急的区别。
en: As regards the sequence of diseases the original or preceding disease is primary while the newly-developed, accompanying one is secondary. Frequently, there is a difference between the primary and the secondary, the principal and the subordinate in complicated and changeable cases, and so is there with order of priority in the treatment of a disease.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.17；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=5-6；en_pdf_pages=360-361；zh_pdf_pages=569-569；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 一般是：急则治其标，缓则治其本，若标本并重，则应标本兼治。
en: In general, in an urgent case treatment aims at relieving the predominant symptoms (the secondary) first. In a chronic case, however, treatment aims at removing its primary cause (the primary).

entities.en: treating the primary and the secondary aspects at the same time

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.17；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=7-8；en_pdf_pages=360-361；zh_pdf_pages=569-569；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 因而治疗时就要根据"有余泻之，不足补之"的原则，调理气血，使气血恢复协调。
en: Therefore, in treating a disease, the relationship between Qi and blood must be regulated to restore their coordination according to the principle of "eliminating what is in excess and make up for what is lacking".
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.31；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=370-371；zh_pdf_pages=573-573；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。；替换原样本 TCM_TRAIN_0967；替换原因：no_entity_after_auto_extraction；候选来源=train_final_1000_cleaned.xlsx；候选id=TCM_TRAIN_0987。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 或针对病因病机治疗。或治其先病、宿疾。
en: In this case, it is advisable to relieve the primary disease, or treat the original or old disorder according to its cause and pathogenesis.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.19；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=361-362；zh_pdf_pages=569-569；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 此时标本均不太急，治宜益气解表，益气以治本，解表以治标，也是标本同治之法。
en: Since both the primary and the secondary aspects are not too critical, it is advisable to suplement Qi and expel exogenous pathogens, with the former aiming at relieving the primary disorder and the latter at relieving the secondary one.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.20；zh_sentence_span=6；en_sentence_span=7；en_pdf_pages=362-363；zh_pdf_pages=569-570；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 祛邪能够排除病邪的侵害和千扰，有利于正气的保存和恢复。
en: In so doing, invasion and affection by pathogens can be warded off and vital Qi be preserved and restored.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.22；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=363-364；zh_pdf_pages=570-570；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 因而祛邪与扶正一样，也是临床治疗的一个重要法则。
en: Therefore, eliminating pathogens, like supporting vital Qi, is also one of the important principles underlying clinical therapy.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.22；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=363-364；zh_pdf_pages=570-570；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 祛邪多用泻实之法，适用于以邪实为主要矛盾，而正气未衰的实性病证。
en: Eliminating pathogens can be achieved mostly by the use of purgative method for excess syndrome, which is applicable to excess syndromes, in which invasion by pathogens is the primary contradiction and vital Qi has not been on the decline yet.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.22；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=363-364；zh_pdf_pages=570-570；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 不同的邪气，不同的部位，其具体治法也不一样。
en: However, the actual therapeutic method employed for this purpose varies greatly with different pathogens and with different sites of their invasion.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.22；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=5；en_pdf_pages=363-364；zh_pdf_pages=570-570；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如表邪盛者，宣发汗解表；邪在朐脘上部，或痰涎壅盛、或宿食停滞，或食物中毒等，宜用吐法；邪在肠胃下部，如热邪与肠中糟粕互结，应采用下法；实热实火，宜用清热泻火之法；寒证宜用温中祛寒之法；湿证宜化湿利湿；有痰的应祛痰；有瘀血的应活血化瘀，等等。
en: For example, in case of attack of the superficies by exuberant exogenous pathogens, diaphoretic therapy is indicated; in case of invasion of the upper part of the chest by pathogens, accompanied by accumulation of abundant sputum and saliva, or prolonged retention of food in the gastrointestinal tract, or food poisoning, it is advisable to apply emetic therapy; in case of invasion of the lower part of the gastrointestinal tract by pathogens with pathogenic heat combined with waste products in the intestines, purgation is practiced; in case of sthenic heat-syndrome and sthenic fire-syndrome, heat-clearing and fire-purging therapy is applied; in case of cold-syndrome it is advisable to eliminate pathogenic cold by warming the middle-Jiao; and in case of dampness syndrome it is better to dispel pathogenic dampness by promoting diuresis. In addition, phlegm must be resolved, whenever it is found to exist, and blood stasis, whenever it is detected, be removed by promoting blood circulation.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.22；zh_sentence_span=6；en_sentence_span=6-7；en_pdf_pages=363-364；zh_pdf_pages=570-570；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 即以扶正为主，兼顾祛邪。适用于以正虚为主的虚实夹杂证。
en: This is a therapeutic approach with support of vital Qi as the dominant factor, supplemented by elimination of pathogens, which is applicable to asthenia-syndrome accompanied by sthenia-syndrome with the former as the major trouble.

entities.en: combination of deficiency and excess syndromes

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.23；zh_sentence_span=1-2；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=364-365；zh_pdf_pages=570-571；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如脾虚湿盛之证，是由脾虚不运而导致的痰湿内生的虚实夹杂证，治应健脾扶正为主，兼顾祛痰化湿以祛邪实，即属扶正兼祛邪之法。
en: For example, the insufficiency of the spleen with overabundance of dampnees, which is asthenia-syndrome accompanied with sthenia-syndrome caused by dysfunction of the spleen in transport due to its insufficiency resulting in the production of phlegm-dampness in the body, should be treated mainly by invigorating the spleen to support vital Qi, supplemented by removing phlegm-dampness to eliminate pathogens. This is how this approach works.

entities.en: combination of deficiency and excess syndromes

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.23；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=3-4；en_pdf_pages=364-365；zh_pdf_pages=570-571；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 适用于以邪实为主的虚实夹杂证。
en: It is indicated in sthenia-syndrome accompanied by a sthenia-syndrome with excessive pathogens as the main trouble.

entities.en: combination of deficiency and excess syndromes

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.24；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=365-365；zh_pdf_pages=571-571；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如某些虫积病人，因正气太虚弱，不宜驱虫，应先健脾以扶正，使正气得到一定恢复之后，再驱虫消积。
en: For example, some patients with malnutrition due to parasitic infestation should first be treated by invigorating the spleen to support vital Qi because the latter is too weak to tolerate parasiticidal therapy. Only after vital Qi is restored to its normal condition, can parasiticidal therapy with removing food-stagnancy be employed.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.25；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=4-5；en_pdf_pages=366-366；zh_pdf_pages=571-571；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 此时若兼以扶正，反会助邪、留邪，故应先祛邪后扶正，而不用祛邪兼扶正之法。
en: In this case if treatment of supporting vital Qi is simultaneously applied, contrary to what is expected, pathogens may be encouraged and left in the body.

entities.en: eliminating pathogens before support of vital Qi

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.26；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=366-367；zh_pdf_pages=571-571；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如瘀血内阻所致的崩漏，虽因崩漏失血而正虚，但瘀血不去，崩漏难止，补之无益，故应先用活血化瘀法祛邪实，然后补血扶正。
en: For example, the syndrome of metrorrhagia and metrostaxis due to obstruction of stagnated blood in the interior leading to deficiency of vital Qi because of loss of blood is not easy to stop and a therapy for invigoration is of no help either, jf blood stasis is not removed.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.26；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=366-367；zh_pdf_pages=571-571；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 同样，其它脏腑的病变，也要根据各脏腑生理上相互联系，病理上相互影响的道理，注意调整各脏腑之间的关系，使其功能恢复协调，才能收到较好的治疗效果。
en: Similarly, in treating disorders of other Zang-Fu organs we should make every effort to regulate the relationship between all Zang-Fu organs, enabling them to coordinate each other in functioning on the basis of the theory of their physiological interconnection and pathological interaction. Only in so doing can good results be achieved..
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.30；zh_sentence_span=6；en_sentence_span=6-7；en_pdf_pages=369-370；zh_pdf_pages=572-573；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 气为血之帅，血为气之母。
en: Qi serves as the commander of blood, which, in turn, acts as the mother of Qi, this referring to a close relation between them.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.31；zh_sentence_span=1；en_sentence_span=1；en_pdf_pages=370-371；zh_pdf_pages=573-573；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 当气血这种相互为用的关系失常时，则产生各种气血失调病证。
en: When this interaction between them ceases to function, various disorders due to incoordination between them may ensue.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.31；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=370-371；zh_pdf_pages=573-573；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如气能生血，气虚则生血不足，而致血虚或气血两虚，治应以补气为主，兼顾补血；气能行血，气虚或气滞，可致血瘀，称为气虚血瘀或气滞血瘀，治应补气行血或理气活血化瘀；气机逆乱，血随气逆，常可致昏厥或咯血、呕血，治应降气和血；气能摄血，气虚摄血无权，可致出血，治宜补气摄血；血为气之母，血虚则气亦不足，血脱则气随之而脱，治应根据血脱先益气的原则，急宜补气固脱。
en: For instance, in case of deficiency of blood or deficiency of both Qi and blood resulting from insufficient blood formation due to deficiency of Qi (the function of which is to produce blood), treatment should be aimed mainly at invigorating Qi supplemented by replenishing blood; in case of blood stasis resulting from deficiency or stagnation of Qi (the function of which is to promote blood circulation), also known as blood stasis due to deficiency of Qi or blood stasis due to stagnation of Qi, treatment be aimed at invigorating Qi to promote blood circulation or at promoting the flow of Qi to activate blood circulation, thereby dissipating blood stasis; in case of syncope or hemoptysis and hematemesis due to bleeding resulting from adverse rising of Qi as a result of its functional disturbance, it is necessary to regulate blood flow by sending down adversely ascending Qi; in case of hemorrhage due to deficiency of Qi which fails to control blood flow, it is advisable to control blood flow by invigorating Qi; and in case of exhaustion of Qi resulting from massive hemorrhage (because deficiency of blood, the mother of Qi, leads to insufficiency of Qi), it is essential to arrest bleeding by invigorating Qi in acute cases on the basis of the principle of treating blood collapse by first supplementing Qi.

entities.en: stagnation of Qi and blood stasis
deficiency of both Qi and blood

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.31；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=370-371；zh_pdf_pages=573-573；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 疾病的发生、发展与转归，受各方面因素的影响，如时令气候、地理环境等。
en: The occurrence, development and termination of a disease are influenced by various factors, such as climatic and geograhphico-environmental conditions, and constitutional factors of an individual in particular.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.32；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=372-372；zh_pdf_pages=573-574；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 尤其是患者个体的体质因素，对疾病的影响更大。因此，在治疗疾病时，必须把各种影响疾病的因素一并考虑进去，在辨证时，做到具体情况具体分析，区别对待，以制定出适宜的治疗方法。
en: Therefore, in treating a disease, we must take into consideration all factors contributing to it, to make a concrete analysis of concrete conditions and deal with them in different ways, thereby working out a proper method of treatment.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.32；zh_sentence_span=3-4；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=372-372；zh_pdf_pages=573-574；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 季节气候不同，用药有别，即所谓因时制宜。
en: Consequently administration of different drugs to different patients according to different seasons and climates is known as treatment in accordance with seasonal conditions.

entities.en: treatment in accordance with seasonal conditions

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.33；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=4；en_pdf_pages=372-373；zh_pdf_pages=574-574；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如西北严寒地区，风寒感冒证常用麻黄、桂枝等发汗力强的药物，且药量稍重；而东南温热地区，风寒感冒证则很少用麻黄、桂枝，一般用药力较轻的荆芥、防风替代，且药量较轻。
en: For example, the common cold in the northwest severely cold area is always treated with drastic sudorifics in large doses such as Chinese ephedra Herba Ephedrae and cassia (twig) Ramulus, etc. In the southeast warm area, however, it is treated usually with drugs Herba Schizonetae and Radix Ledebourielle with mild effect and in smaller doses. Drugs such as Chinese ephedra Herba Ephedrae and cassia (twig) Ramulus are rarely prescribed.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.34；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2-4；en_pdf_pages=373-373；zh_pdf_pages=574-574；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 地域不同，用药有别，即所谓因地制宜。
en: In consequence, administration of different drugs to different patients according to different localities is known as treatment in accordance with local conditions.

entities.en: treatment in accordance with local conditions

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.34；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=5；en_pdf_pages=373-373；zh_pdf_pages=574-574；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 如老年人与小儿，年龄不同，生理功能与病变特点也有区别。
en: For example, an old person differs from a child not only in age but also in physiological functions and pathological manifestations.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.35；zh_sentence_span=2；en_sentence_span=2；en_pdf_pages=373-374；zh_pdf_pages=574-577；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 老年人气血衰少，生机减退，患病多虚证或虚实夹杂证。
en: The former due to deficiency of Qi and blood and decline of physiological functions often suffers from deficiency-syndrome or asthenia-syndrome accompanied by sthenia-syndrome.

entities.en: combination of deficiency and excess syndromes

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.35；zh_sentence_span=3；en_sentence_span=3；en_pdf_pages=373-374；zh_pdf_pages=574-577；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 治疗时，虚证宜补，而有邪实宜攻者，亦应注意配方用药，药量应比青壮年轻。
en: In this case, therapy for invigoration is indicated. In case of excessive pathogens to be eliminated, purgative drugs should be prescribed with great caution and in doses smaller than those for young people or people during their prime.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.35；zh_sentence_span=4；en_sentence_span=4-5；en_pdf_pages=373-374；zh_pdf_pages=574-577；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 小儿生机旺盛，但气血未充，脏腑娇嫩，易寒易热，易虚易实，病情变化快。
en: The latter, who due to exuberant vitality, inadequacy of Qi and blood and delicate and tender Zang-Fu organs is susceptible to cold or heat, to asthenia or sthenia, suffers from a disease with a rapid progress.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.35；zh_sentence_span=5；en_sentence_span=6；en_pdf_pages=373-374；zh_pdf_pages=574-577；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 是指气和血的不足及其各自生理功能的异常，以及气和血互根互用的功能失常等病理变化。
en: It refers to a morbid condition due to insufficiency of Qi and blood and abnormality of their respective physiological functions and dysfunction of their interdependence and interaction as well.
note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=7.24；en_pdf_pages=181-181；zh_pdf_pages=474-474；按同一小节首个正文句抽取，已排除绪论并清理OCR断词/明显乱码。；补充修正：从原教材句对中按语义片段重新抽取/修正，避开严重中英长度比例异常，并复核英文OCR与术语格式。；替换原样本 TCM_TRAIN_0998；替换原因：no_entity_after_auto_extraction；候选来源=dev_final_250_cleaned.xlsx；候选id=TCM_DEV_0142。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。

zh: 这种治病时考虑人的整体性和不同人的个体差异的原则，就是因人制宜。
en: As a consequence, this therapeutic principle, whereby treatment is prescribed, taking into account the human body as a whole and individual differences among different persons, is referred to as treatment in accordance with physique of an individual.

entities.en: treatment in accordance with constitution of an individual

note: 来源：Essentials of Traditional Chinese Medicine / 中医学基础；section=10.35；zh_sentence_span=11；en_sentence_span=12；en_pdf_pages=373-374；zh_pdf_pages=574-577；已排除绪论和第2章阴阳小节(2.1-2.22)，过滤直接含“阴/阳/Yin/Yang”的句子，并与dev/test去重；使用同一小节内句序/短句块动态对齐，优先保留病机、诊法、证候、脏腑功能、治法等医理句。 | 清洗说明：已进行 OCR/术语规范化与跨划分近重复筛查。
